229.yw_en: From Supārśva came a son named Sumati, from Sumati came Sannatimān, and from Sannatimān came Kṛtī, who achieved mystic power from Brahmā and taught six saṁhitās of the Prācyasāma verses of the Sāma Veda. The son of Kṛtī was Nīpa; the son of Nīpa, Udgrāyudha; the son of Udgrāyudha, Kṣemya; the son of Kṣemya, Suvīra; and the son of Suvīra, Ripuñjaya.

229.ldw:
tato bahuratho nāma
 purumīḍho ’prajo ’bhavat
nalinyām ajamīḍhasya
 nīlaḥ śāntis tu tat-sutaḥ|
229.ldw_fc: tataḥ ; bahurathaḥ ; nāma ; purumīḍhaḥ ; aprajaḥ ; abhavat ; nalinyām ; ajamīḍhasya ; nīlaḥ ; śāntiḥ ; tu ; tat-sutaḥ ;
229.words_en_fc: from him (Ripuñjaya); Bahuratha; named; Purumīḍha, the younger brother of Dvimīḍha; sonless; became; through Nalinī; of Ajamīḍha; Nīla; Śānti; then; the son of Nīla.;
229.yw_zh: 瑞彭佳互生了巴胡茹阿塔。菩茹弥达没有儿子。 阿佳弥达与他名叫娜莉妮的妻子生了儿子尼拉，尼拉的儿子是商提。
229.yw_en: From Ripuñjaya came a son named Bahuratha. Purumīḍha was sonless. Ajamīḍha had a son named Nīla by his wife known as Nalinī, and the son of Nīla was Śānti.

229.ldw:
śānteḥ suśāntis tat-putraḥ
 purujo ’rkas tato ’bhavat
bharmyāśvas tanayas tasya
 pañcāsan mudgalādayaḥ|yavīnaro bṛhadviśvaḥ
 kāmpillaḥ sañjayaḥ sutāḥ
bharmyāśvaḥ prāha putrā me
 pañcānāṁ rakṣaṇāya hi|viṣayāṇām alam ime
 iti pañcāla-saṁjñitāḥ
mudgalād brahma-nirvṛttaṁ
 gotraṁ maudgalya-saṁjñitam|
229.ldw_fc: śānteḥ ; suśāntiḥ ; tat-putraḥ ; purujaḥ ; arkaḥ ; tataḥ ; abhavat ; bharmyāśvaḥ ; tanayaḥ ; tasya ; pañca ; āsan ; mudgala-ādayaḥ ; yavīnaraḥ ; bṛhadviśvaḥ ; kāmpillaḥ ; sañjayaḥ ; sutāḥ ; bharmyāśvaḥ ; prāha ; putrāḥ ; me ; pañcānām ; rakṣaṇāya ; hi ; viṣayāṇām ; alam ; ime ; iti ; pañcāla ; saṁjñitāḥ ; mudgalāt ; brahma-nirvṛttam ; gotram ; maudgalya ; saṁjñitam ;
229.words_en_fc: of Śānti; Suśānti; his son; Puruja; Arka; from him; generated; Bharmyāśva; son; of him; five sons; were; headed by Mudgala; Yavīnara; Bṛhadviśva; Kāmpilla; Sañjaya; sons; Bharmyāśva; said; sons; my; of five; for protection; indeed; of different states; competent; all of them; thus; Pañcāla; designated; from Mudgala; consisting of brāhmaṇas; a dynasty; Maudgalya; so designated.;
229.yw_zh: 商提生子苏商提，苏商提的儿子是菩茹佳，菩茹佳得子阿尔卡。阿尔卡生了巴尔弥亚刷，巴尔弥亚刷有五个儿子，分别名叫穆德嘎拉、亚维纳尔、毕尔哈兑刷、康皮拉和桑佳亚。巴尔弥亚刷恳求他的儿子说:”我的儿子们，请负责照管我的五个国家，因为你们完全称职。”他的儿子们因此被称为潘查拉。从穆德嘎拉，传下名叫毛德嘎利亚的布茹阿玛纳家族。
229.yw_en: The son of Śānti was Suśānti, the son of Suśānti was Puruja, and the son of Puruja was Arka. From Arka came Bharmyāśva, and from Bharmyāśva came five sons — Mudgala, Yavīnara, Bṛhadviśva, Kāmpilla and Sañjaya. Bharmyāśva prayed to his sons, “O my sons, please take charge of my five states, for you are quite competent to do so.” Thus his five sons were known as the Pañcālas. From Mudgala came a dynasty of brāhmaṇas known as Maudgalya.

229.ldw:
mithunaṁ mudgalād bhārmyād
 divodāsaḥ pumān abhūt
ahalyā kanyakā yasyāṁ
 śatānandas tu gautamāt|
229.ldw_fc: mithunam ; mudgalāt ; bhārmyāt ; divodāsaḥ ; pumān ; abhūt ; ahalyā ; kanyakā ; yasyām ; śatānandaḥ ; tu ; gautamāt ;
229.words_en_fc: twins, one male and one female; from Mudgala; the son of Bharmyāśva; Divodāsa; the male one; generated; Ahalyā; the female; through whom; Śatānanda; indeed; generated by her husband, Gautama.;
229.yw_zh: 巴尔弥亚刷的儿子穆德嘎拉生下一对孪生兄妹， 男孩名叫迪沃达斯，女孩名叫阿哈莉雅。阿哈莉雅的丈夫高塔玛，与她生了儿子沙塔南达。
229.yw_en: Mudgala, the son of Bharmyāśva, had twin children, one male and the other female. The male child was named Divodāsa, and the female child was named Ahalyā. From the womb of Ahalyā by the semen of her husband, Gautama, came a son named Śatānanda.

229.ldw:
tasya satyadhṛtiḥ putro
 dhanur-veda-viśāradaḥ
śaradvāṁs tat-suto yasmād
 urvaśī-darśanāt kila
śara-stambe ’patad reto
 mithunaṁ tad abhūc chubham|
229.ldw_fc: tasya ; satyadhṛtiḥ ; putraḥ ; dhanuḥ-veda-viśāradaḥ ; śaradvān ; tat-sutaḥ ; yasmāt ; urvaśī-darśanāt ; kila ; śara-stambe ; apatat ; retaḥ ; mithunam ; tat abhūt ; śubham ;
229.words_en_fc: of him (Śatānanda); Satyadhṛti; a son; very expert in the art of archery; Śaradvān; the son of Satyadhṛti; from whom; simply by seeing the celestial Urvaśī; indeed; on a clump of śara grass; fell; semen; a male and female; there were born; all-auspicious.;
229.yw_zh: 萨塔南达的儿子是萨提亚兑提。萨提亚兑提擅长射箭，他的儿子是沙茹阿德万。沙茹阿德万遇见乌尔娃悉时射精，精子落在一簇沙茹阿草上。两个绝对吉祥的婴儿从这精子中诞生，一个是男性，另一个是女性。
229.yw_en: The son of Śatānanda was Satyadhṛti, who was expert in archery, and the son of Satyadhṛti was Śaradvān. When Śaradvān met Urvaśī, he discharged semen, which fell on a clump of śara grass. From this semen were born two all-auspicious babies, one male and the other female.

229.ldw:
tad dṛṣṭvā kṛpayāgṛhṇāc
 chāntanur mṛgayāṁ caran
kṛpaḥ kumāraḥ kanyā ca
 droṇa-patny abhavat kṛpī|
229.ldw_fc: tat ; dṛṣṭvā ; kṛpayā ; agṛhṇāt ; śāntanuḥ ; mṛgayām ; caran ; kṛpaḥ ; kumāraḥ ; kanyā ; ca ; droṇa-patnī ; abhavat ; kṛpī ;
229.words_en_fc: those twin male and female babies; seeing; out of compassion; took; King Śāntanu; while hunting in the forest; wandering in that way; Kṛpa; the male child; the female child; also; the wife of Droṇācārya; became; named Kṛpī.;
229.yw_zh: 商塔努王在打猎的行程中，看到一另一女两个孩子躺在森林中，便出于同情将他们带回家。由此，男孩名叫奎帕、女孩名叫奎琵。奎琵后来成为朵纳查尔亚的妻子。
229.yw_en: While Mahārāja Śāntanu was on a hunting excursion, he saw the male and female children lying in the forest, and out of compassion he took them home. Consequently, the male child was known as Kṛpa, and the female child was named Kṛpī. Kṛpī later became the wife of Droṇācārya.
229.yz_en: Thus end the Bhaktivedanta purports of the Ninth Canto, Twenty-first Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “The Dynasty of Bharata.”

230.ldw:
śrī-śuka uvāca|mitrāyuś ca divodāsāc
 cyavanas tat-suto nṛpa
sudāsaḥ sahadevo ’tha
 somako jantu-janmakṛt|
230.ldw_fc: śrī-śukaḥ uvāca ; mitrāyuḥ ; ca ; divodāsāt ; cyavanaḥ ; tat-sutaḥ ; nṛpa ; sudāsaḥ ; sahadevaḥ ; atha ; somakaḥ ; jantu-janma-kṛt ;
230.words_en_fc: Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said; Mitrāyu; and; was born from Divodāsa; Cyavana; the son of Mitrāyu; O King; Sudāsa; Sahadeva; thereafter; Somaka; the father of Jantu.;
230.yw_zh: 舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米说:君王啊!迪沃达斯的儿子是弥陀尤，弥陀尤有四个儿子，分别名叫恰瓦纳、苏达斯、苏哈戴瓦和索玛卡。索玛卡是湛图的父亲。
230.yw_en: Śukadeva Gosvāmī said: O King, the son of Divodāsa was Mitrāyu, and from Mitrāyu came four sons, named Cyavana, Sudāsa, Sahadeva and Somaka. Somaka was the father of Jantu.

230.ldw:
tasya putra-śataṁ teṣāṁ
 yavīyān pṛṣataḥ sutaḥ
sa tasmād drupado jajñe
 sarva-sampat-samanvitaḥ|
230.ldw_fc: tasya ; putra-śatam ; teṣām ; yavīyān ; pṛṣataḥ ; sutaḥ ; saḥ ; tasmāt ; drupadaḥ ; jajñe ; sarva-sampat ; samanvitaḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: of him (Somaka); one hundred sons; of all of them; the youngest; Pṛṣata; the son; he; from him (Pṛṣata); Drupada; was born; with all opulences; decorated.;
230.yw_zh: 索玛卡有一百个儿子，其中最小的是普瑞沙塔。 普瑞沙塔生了在所有方面都绝对优秀的杜茹帕达王。
230.yw_en: Somaka had one hundred sons, of whom the youngest was Pṛṣata. From Pṛṣata was born King Drupada, who was opulent in all supremacy.

230.ldw:
drupadād draupadī tasya
 dhṛṣṭadyumnādayaḥ sutāḥ
dhṛṣṭadyumnād dhṛṣṭaketur
 bhārmyāḥ pāñcālakā ime|
230.ldw_fc: drupadāt ; draupadī ; tasya ; dhṛṣṭadyumna-ādayaḥ ; sutāḥ ; dhṛṣṭadyumnāt ; dhṛṣṭaketuḥ ; bhārmyāḥ ; pāñcālakāḥ ; ime ;
230.words_en_fc: from Drupada; Draupadī, the famous wife of the Pāṇḍavas; of him (Drupada); headed by Dhṛṣṭadyumna; sons; from Dhṛṣṭadyumna; the son named Dhṛṣṭaketu; all descendants of Bharmyāśva; they are known as the Pāñcālakas; all of these.;
230.yw_zh: 杜茹帕达王生了朵帕蒂，以及以兑施塔杜么纳为首的许多儿子。兑施塔杜么纳生子兑施塔凯图。所有这些人物都被称为巴尔弥亚施瓦的后代，或潘查拉王朝的后代。
230.yw_en: From Mahārāja Drupada, Draupadī was born. Mahārāja Drupada also had many sons, headed by Dhṛṣṭadyumna. From Dhṛṣṭadyumna came a son named Dhṛṣṭaketu. All these personalities are known as descendants of Bharmyāśva or as the dynasty of Pāñcāla.

230.ldw:
yo ’jamīḍha-suto hy anya
 ṛkṣaḥ saṁvaraṇas tataḥ
tapatyāṁ sūrya-kanyāyāṁ
 kurukṣetra-patiḥ kuruḥ|parīkṣiḥ sudhanur jahnur
 niṣadhaś ca kuroḥ sutāḥ
suhotro ’bhūt sudhanuṣaś
 cyavano ’tha tataḥ kṛtī|
230.ldw_fc: yaḥ ; ajamīḍha-sutaḥ ; hi ; anyaḥ ; ṛkṣaḥ ; saṁvaraṇaḥ ; tataḥ ; tapatyām ; sūrya-kanyāyām ; kurukṣetra-patiḥ ; kuruḥ ; parīkṣiḥ sudhanuḥ jahnuḥ niṣadhaḥ ca ; kuroḥ ; sutāḥ ; suhotraḥ ; abhūt ; sudhanuṣaḥ ; cyavanaḥ ; atha ; tataḥ ; kṛtī ;
230.words_en_fc: who; was a son born from Ajamīḍha; indeed; another; Ṛkṣa; Saṁvaraṇa; from him (Ṛkṣa); Tapatī; in the womb of the daughter of the sun-god; the King of Kurukṣetra; Kuru was born; Parīkṣi, Sudhanu, Jahnu and Niṣadha; of Kuru; the sons; Suhotra; was born; from Sudhanu; Cyavana; from Suhotra; from him (Cyavana); a son named Kṛtī.;
230.yw_zh: 阿佳弥达的另一个儿子名叫瑞克沙，瑞克沙的儿子是桑瓦茹阿纳。桑瓦茹阿纳与太阳神的女儿一一他妻子塔帕缇，生了库茹一一库茹柴陀的君王。库茹有四个儿子，分别是帕瑞克希、苏达努、佳努和尼沙达。苏达努生了苏厚陀，苏厚陀生下恰瓦纳。恰瓦纳的儿子是奎提。
230.yw_en: Another son of Ajamīḍha was known as Ṛkṣa. From Ṛkṣa came a son named Saṁvaraṇa, and from Saṁvaraṇa through the womb of his wife, Tapatī, the daughter of the sun-god, came Kuru, the King of Kurukṣetra. Kuru had four sons — Parīkṣi, Sudhanu, Jahnu and Niṣadha. From Sudhanu, Suhotra was born, and from Suhotra, Cyavana. From Cyavana, Kṛtī was born.

230.ldw:
vasus tasyoparicaro
 bṛhadratha-mukhās tataḥ
kuśāmba-matsya-pratyagra-
 cedipādyāś ca cedipāḥ|
230.ldw_fc: vasuḥ ; tasya ; uparicaraḥ ; bṛhadratha-mukhāḥ ; tataḥ ; kuśāmba ; matsya ; pratyagra ; cedipa-ādyāḥ ; ca ; cedi-pāḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: a son named Vasu; of him (Kṛtī); the surname of Vasu; headed by Bṛhadratha; from him (Vasu); Kuśāmba; Matsya; Pratyagra; Cedipa and others; also; all of them became rulers of the Cedi state.;
230.yw_zh: 奎提的儿子名叫乌帕瑞查尔·瓦苏。在乌帕瑞查尔·瓦苏的儿子中，有以毕尔哈铎塔为首的库商巴、玛茨亚、帕提亚卦和切迪帕;他们都成为切迪国的统治者。
230.yw_en: The son of Kṛtī was Uparicara Vasu, and among his sons, headed by Bṛhadratha, were Kuśāmba, Matsya, Pratyagra and Cedipa. All the sons of Uparicara Vasu became rulers of the Cedi state.

230.ldw:
bṛhadrathāt kuśāgro ’bhūd
 ṛṣabhas tasya tat-sutaḥ
jajñe satyahito ’patyaṁ
 puṣpavāṁs tat-suto jahuḥ|
230.ldw_fc: bṛhadrathāt ; kuśāgraḥ ; abhūt ; ṛṣabhaḥ ; tasya ; tat-sutaḥ ; jajñe ; satyahitaḥ ; apatyam ; puṣpavān ; tat-sutaḥ ; jahuḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: from Bṛhadratha; Kuśāgra; a son was born; Ṛṣabha; of him (Kuśāgra); his (Ṛṣabha’s) son; was born; Satyahita; offspring; Puṣpavān; his (Puṣpavān’s) son; Jahu.;
230.yw_zh: 毕尔哈铎塔生了库沙卦，库沙卦的儿子是瑞沙巴，瑞沙巴生子萨提亚黑塔。萨提亚黑塔的儿子名叫菩施帕万，菩施帕万的儿子是佳胡。
230.yw_en: From Bṛhadratha, Kuśāgra was born; from Kuśāgra, Ṛṣabha; and from Ṛṣabha, Satyahita. The son of Satyahita was Puṣpavān, and the son of Puṣpavān was Jahu.

230.ldw:
anyasyām api bhāryāyāṁ
 śakale dve bṛhadrathāt
ye mātrā bahir utsṛṣṭe
 jarayā cābhisandhite
jīva jīveti krīḍantyā
 jarāsandho ’bhavat sutaḥ|
230.ldw_fc: anyasyām ; api ; bhāryāyām ; śakale ; dve ; bṛhadrathāt ; ye ; mātrā ; bahiḥ utsṛṣṭe ; jarayā ; ca ; abhisandhite ; jīva jīva iti ; krīḍantyā ; jarāsandhaḥ ; abhavat ; sutaḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: in another; also; wife; parts; two; from Bṛhadratha; which two parts; by the mother; because of rejection; by the demoness named Jarā; and; when they were joined together; O living entity, be alive; playing like that; Jarāsandha; was generated; a son.;
230.yw_zh: 毕尔哈铎塔与另一个妻子生了一个儿子的两半身体。这位母亲看到还两个半边身体时便丢弃了它们。但后来，一个名叫佳茹阿的女魔玩耍着将它们连在一起并说: “活过来，活过来吧!”就这样，名叫佳尔桑达的儿子诞生了。
230.yw_en: Through the womb of another wife, Bṛhadratha begot two halves of a son. When the mother saw those two halves she rejected them, but later a she-demon named Jarā playfully joined them and said, “Come to life, come to life!” Thus the son named Jarāsandha was born.

230.ldw:
tataś ca sahadevo ’bhūt
 somāpir yac chrutaśravāḥ
parīkṣir anapatyo ’bhūt
 suratho nāma jāhnavaḥ|
230.ldw_fc: tataḥ ca ; sahadevaḥ ; abhūt ; somāpiḥ ; yat ; śrutaśravāḥ ; parīkṣiḥ ; anapatyaḥ ; abhūt ; surathaḥ ; nāma ; jāhnavaḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: and from him (Jarāsandha); Sahadeva; was born; Somāpi; of him (Somāpi); a son named Śrutaśravā; the son of Kuru named Parīkṣi; without any son; became; Suratha; named; was the son of Jahnu.;
230.yw_zh: 佳尔桑达的儿子是萨哈戴瓦;萨哈戴瓦生了索玛琵;索玛琵生子施茹塔刷瓦。库茹的儿子帕瑞克希没有子孙，但库茹的另一个儿子佳努有个名叫苏茹阿塔的儿子。
230.yw_en: From Jarāsandha came a son named Sahadeva; from Sahadeva, Somāpi; and from Somāpi, Śrutaśravā. The son of Kuru called Parīkṣi had no sons, but the son of Kuru called Jahnu had a son named Suratha.

230.ldw:
tato vidūrathas tasmāt
 sārvabhaumas tato ’bhavat
jayasenas tat-tanayo
 rādhiko ’to ’yutāyv abhūt|
230.ldw_fc: tataḥ ; vidūrathaḥ ; tasmāt ; sārvabhaumaḥ ; tataḥ ; abhavat ; jayasenaḥ ; tat-tanayaḥ ; rādhikaḥ ; ataḥ ; ayutāyuḥ ; abhūt ;
230.words_en_fc: from him (Suratha); a son named Vidūratha; from him (Vidūratha); a son named Sārvabhauma; from him (Sārvabhauma); was born; Jayasena; the son of Jayasena; Rādhika; and from him (Rādhika); Ayutāyu; was born.;
230.yw_zh: 苏茹阿塔生子维杜茹阿塔，维杜茹阿塔成为萨尔瓦宝玛的父亲。萨尔瓦宝玛生子佳亚森纳，佳亚森纳的儿子是茹阿迪卡，茹阿迪卡生了阿尤塔尤。
230.yw_en: From Suratha came a son named Vidūratha, from whom Sārvabhauma was born. From Sārvabhauma came Jayasena; from Jayasena, Rādhika; and from Rādhika, Ayutāyu.

230.ldw:
tataś cākrodhanas tasmād
 devātithir amuṣya ca
ṛkṣas tasya dilīpo ’bhūt
 pratīpas tasya cātmajaḥ|
230.ldw_fc: tataḥ ; ca ; akrodhanaḥ ; tasmāt ; devātithiḥ ; amuṣya ; ca ; ṛkṣaḥ ; tasya ; dilīpaḥ ; abhūt ; pratīpaḥ ; tasya ; ca ; ātma-jaḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: from him (Ayutāyu); and; a son named Akrodhana; from him (Akrodhana); a son named Devātithi; of him (Devātithi); also; Ṛkṣa; of him (Ṛkṣa); a son named Dilīpa; was born; Pratīpa; of him (Dilīpa); and; the son.;
230.yw_zh: 阿尤塔尤的儿子名叫阿阔达纳，阿阔达纳的儿子是戴瓦提缇。戴瓦提缇生子瑞克沙，瑞克沙的儿子是迪利帕，迪利帕生了帕提帕。
230.yw_en: From Ayutāyu came a son named Akrodhana, and his son was Devātithi. The son of Devātithi was Ṛkṣa, the son of Ṛkṣa was Dilīpa, and the son of Dilīpa was Pratīpa.

230.ldw:
devāpiḥ śāntanus tasya
 bāhlīka iti cātmajāḥ
pitṛ-rājyaṁ parityajya
 devāpis tu vanaṁ gataḥ|abhavac chāntanū rājā
 prāṅ mahābhiṣa-saṁjñitaḥ
yaṁ yaṁ karābhyāṁ spṛśati
 jīrṇaṁ yauvanam eti saḥ|
230.ldw_fc: devāpiḥ ; śāntanuḥ ; tasya ; bāhlīkaḥ ; iti ; ca ; ātma-jāḥ ; pitṛ-rājyam ; parityajya ; devāpiḥ ; tu ; vanam ; gataḥ ; abhavat ; śāntanuḥ ; rājā ; prāk ; mahābhiṣa ; saṁjñitaḥ ; yam yam ; karābhyām ; spṛśati ; jīrṇam ; yauvanam ; eti ; saḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: Devāpi; Śāntanu; of him (Pratīpa); Bāhlīka; thus; also; the sons; the father’s property, the kingdom; rejecting; Devāpi, the eldest; indeed; to the forest; left; was; Śāntanu; the king; before; Mahābhiṣa; most celebrated; whomever; with his hands; touched; although very old; youth; attained; he.;
230.yw_zh: 帕提帕有戴瓦琵、商塔努和巴利卡这几个儿子。 戴瓦琵离开他父亲的王国去森林，因此商塔努当上国王。前生名叫玛哈毕沙的商塔努，具有只要用手触碰人，就能使被触碰之人返老还童的能力。
230.yw_en: The sons of Pratīpa were Devāpi, Śāntanu and Bāhlīka. Devāpi left the kingdom of his father and went to the forest, and therefore Śāntanu became the king. Śāntanu, who in his previous birth was known as Mahābhiṣa, had the ability to transform anyone from old age to youth simply by touching that person with his hands.

230.ldw:
śāntim āpnoti caivāgryāṁ
 karmaṇā tena śāntanuḥ
samā dvādaśa tad-rājye
 na vavarṣa yadā vibhuḥ|śāntanur brāhmaṇair uktaḥ
 parivettāyam agrabhuk
rājyaṁ dehy agrajāyāśu
 pura-rāṣṭra-vivṛddhaye|
230.ldw_fc: śāntim ; āpnoti ; ca ; eva ; agryām ; karmaṇā ; tena ; śāntanuḥ ; samāḥ ; dvādaśa ; tat-rājye ; na ; vavarṣa ; yadā ; vibhuḥ ; śāntanuḥ ; brāhmaṇaiḥ ; uktaḥ ; parivettā ; ayam ; agra-bhuk ; rājyam ; dehi ; agrajāya ; āśu ; pura-rāṣṭra ; vivṛddhaye ;
230.words_en_fc: youthfulness for sense gratification; one gets; also; indeed; principally; by the touch of his hand; because of this; known as Śāntanu; years; twelve; in his kingdom; not; sent rain; when; the controller of the rain, namely the King of heaven, Indra; Śāntanu; by the learned brāhmaṇas; when advised; faulty because of being a usurper; this; enjoying in spite of your elder brother’s being present; the kingdom; give; to your elder brother; immediately; of your home and the kingdom; for elevation.;
230.yw_zh: 由于君王只要用手触碰别人，就能让每个人享受感官享乐的快乐，所以名叫商塔努。一次，当王国中十二年都没降雨时，君王与他那些博学的布茹阿玛纳顾问商量，他们说:”你享受你哥哥的财产是不对的。为使你的王国和冢庭得到提升，你应该将王国还给他。”
230.yw_en: Because the King was able to make everyone happy for sense gratification, primarily by the touch of his hand, his name was Śāntanu. Once, when there was no rainfall in the kingdom for twelve years and the King consulted his learned brahminical advisors, they said, “You are faulty for enjoying the property of your elder brother. For the elevation of your kingdom and home, you should return the kingdom to him.”
230.yz_zh: 当弟弟的不能在自己的哥哥还健在时，享受君权或举行阿格尼厚陀火祭(agnihotra-yajna)，否则就是篡位者。
230.yz_en: One cannot enjoy sovereignty or perform an agnihotra-yajña in the presence of one’s elder brother, or else one becomes a usurper, known as parivettā.

230.ldw:
evam ukto dvijair jyeṣṭhaṁ
 chandayām āsa so ’bravīt
tan-mantri-prahitair viprair
 vedād vibhraṁśito girā|veda-vādātivādān vai
 tadā devo vavarṣa ha
devāpir yogam āsthāya
 kalāpa-grāmam āśritaḥ|
230.ldw_fc: evam ; uktaḥ ; dvijaiḥ ; jyeṣṭham ; chandayām āsa ; saḥ ; abravīt ; tat-mantri ; prahitaiḥ ; vipraiḥ ; vedāt ; vibhraṁśitaḥ ; girā ; veda-vāda-ativādān ; vai ; tadā ; devaḥ ; vavarṣa ; ha ; devāpiḥ ; yogam āsthāya ; kalāpa-grāmam ; āśritaḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: thus (as above mentioned); being advised; by the brāhmaṇas; unto his eldest brother, Devāpi; requested to take charge of the kingdom; he (Devāpi); said; by Śāntanu’s minister; instigated; by the brāhmaṇas; from the principles of the Vedas; fallen; by such words; words blaspheming the Vedic injunctions; indeed; at that time; the demigod; showered rains; in the past; Devāpi; accepting the process of mystic yoga; the village known as Kalāpa; took shelter of (and is living in even now).;
230.yw_zh: 听布茹阿玛纳这样说，商塔努王就去森林要求他哥哥掌管王国，因为君王的责任是维护他的国民。然而，商塔努的大臣阿刷瓦尔，曾唆使一些布茹阿玛纳去引诱戴瓦琵违反韦达经中的训示，以使他不配担任国王。那些布茹阿玛纳使戴瓦琵偏离韦达原则之途，因此当商塔努去请求他时， 他不同意当国王。相反，他亵渎韦达原则，并因而堕落。鉴于这种情况，商塔努再次成为国王，天帝因铎因为对他感到满意而降下雨水。戴瓦琵后来走上神秘瑜伽之途，以控制住的心念和感官。他去了卡拉帕村庄，直到现在仍住在那里。
230.yw_en: When the brāhmaṇas said this, Mahārāja Śāntanu went to the forest and requested his elder brother Devāpi to take charge of the kingdom, for it is the duty of a king to maintain his subjects. Previously, however, Śāntanu’s minister Aśvavāra had instigated some brāhmaṇas to induce Devāpi to transgress the injunctions of the Vedas and thus make himself unfit for the post of ruler. The brāhmaṇas deviated Devāpi from the path of the Vedic principles, and therefore when asked by Śāntanu he did not agree to accept the post of ruler. On the contrary, he blasphemed the Vedic principles and therefore became fallen. Under the circumstances, Śāntanu again became the king, and Indra, being pleased, showered rains. Devāpi later took to the path of mystic yoga to control his mind and senses and went to the village named Kalāpagrāma, where he is still living.

230.ldw:
soma-vaṁśe kalau naṣṭe
 kṛtādau sthāpayiṣyati
bāhlīkāt somadatto ’bhūd
 bhūrir bhūriśravās tataḥ|śalaś ca śāntanor āsīd
 gaṅgāyāṁ bhīṣma ātmavān
sarva-dharma-vidāṁ śreṣṭho
 mahā-bhāgavataḥ kaviḥ|
230.ldw_fc: soma-vaṁśe ; kalau ; naṣṭe ; kṛta-ādau ; sthāpayiṣyati ; bāhlīkāt ; somadattaḥ ; abhūt ; bhūriḥ ; bhūri-śravāḥ ; tataḥ ; śalaḥ ca ; śāntanoḥ ; āsīt ; gaṅgāyām ; bhīṣmaḥ ; ātmavān ; sarva-dharma-vidām ; śreṣṭhaḥ ; mahā-bhāgavataḥ ; kaviḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: when the dynasty of the moon-god; in this Age of Kali; being lost; at the beginning of the next Satya-yuga; will reestablish; from Bāhlīka; Somadatta; generated; Bhūri; Bhūriśravā; thereafter; a son named Śala; from Śāntanu; generated; in the womb of Gaṅgā, the wife of Śāntanu; a son named Bhīṣma; self-realized; of all religious persons; the best; an exalted devotee; and a learned scholar.;
230.yw_zh: 当月亮王朝在喀历年代中结束时，戴瓦琵将于下一个萨提亚年代开始时，在这世上重建月亮王朝。巴利卡(商塔努弟弟)的儿子名叫索玛达塔，而他有三个儿子，分别名叫布瑞、布瑞刷瓦和色拉。商塔努与他妻子恒河，生了崇高且觉悟了自我的奉献者兼博学学者彼士玛。
230.yw_en: After the dynasty of the moon-god comes to an end in this Age of Kali, Devāpi, in the beginning of the next Satya-yuga, will reestablish the Soma dynasty in this world. From Bāhlīka [the brother of Śāntanu] came a son named Somadatta, who had three sons, named Bhūri, Bhūriśravā and Śala. From Śāntanu, through the womb of his wife named Gaṅgā, came Bhīṣma, the exalted, self-realized devotee and learned scholar.

230.ldw:
vīra-yūthāgraṇīr yena
 rāmo ’pi yudhi toṣitaḥ
śāntanor dāsa-kanyāyāṁ
 jajñe citrāṅgadaḥ sutaḥ|
230.ldw_fc: vīra-yūtha-agraṇīḥ ; yena ; rāmaḥ api ; yudhi ; toṣitaḥ ; śāntanoḥ ; dāsa-kanyāyām ; jajñe ; citrāṅgadaḥ ; sutaḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: Bhīṣmadeva, the foremost of all warriors; by whom; even Paraśurāma, the incarnation of God; in a fight; was satisfied (when defeated by Bhīṣmadeva); by Śāntanu; in the womb of Satyavatī, who was known as the daughter of a śūdra; was born; Citrāṅgada; a son.;
230.yw_zh: 彼士玛戴瓦是最优秀的战将。当他在一场战斗中打败主帕茹阿舒茹阿玛时，主帕茹阿舒茹阿玛对他很满意。 商塔努与渔民的女儿萨提亚娃缇生了祺创嘎达。
230.yw_en: Bhīṣmadeva was the foremost of all warriors. When he defeated Lord Paraśurāma in a fight, Lord Paraśurāma was very satisfied with him. By the semen of Śāntanu in the womb of Satyavatī, the daughter of a fisherman, Citrāṅgada took birth.
230.yz_zh:
萨提亚娃缇其实是乌帕瑞查茹阿·瓦苏(Uparicara Va-so)的女儿，经名叫玛茨亚嘎尔芭(Matsyagarbha)的女渔民生下。后来由一个渔民抚养长大。

帕茹阿舒茹阿玛(Parasurama)更彼士玛戴瓦之间的战斗，与卡希王(Kasiraja)的三个女儿有关。彼士玛戴瓦代表他弟弟维祺陀维亚行事，强行带走卡希王的三个女儿——安碧卡(Ambika)、安芭莉卡(Ambalika)和安芭(Amba)。安芭认为彼士玛会娶她，于是依恋上他，但彼士玛戴瓦因为发誓终身贞守，所以拒绝娶她。为此，安芭去找彼士玛戴瓦的武术导师帕茹阿舒茹阿玛，帕茹阿舒茹阿玛命令彼士玛娶她。彼士玛戴瓦拒绝执行命令，帕茹阿舒茹阿玛于是与他作战，强迫他接受婚姻。但帕茹阿舒茹阿玛最终被打败，他对彼士玛戴瓦感到满意。
230.yz_en:
Satyavatī was actually the daughter of Uparicara Vasu by the womb of a fisherwoman known as Matsyagarbhā. Later, Satyavatī was raised by a fisherman.

The fight between Paraśurāma and Bhīṣmadeva concerns three daughters of Kāśīrāja — Ambikā, Ambālikā and Ambā — who were forcibly abducted by Bhīṣmadeva, acting on behalf of his brother Vicitravīrya. Ambā thought that Bhīṣmadeva would marry her and became attached to him, but Bhīṣmadeva refused to marry her, for he had taken the vow of brahmacarya. Ambā therefore approached Bhīṣmadeva’s military spiritual master, Paraśurāma, who instructed Bhīṣma to marry her. Bhīṣmadeva refused, and therefore Paraśurāma fought with him to force him to accept the marriage. But Paraśurāma was defeated, and he was pleased with Bhīṣma.

230.ldw:
vicitravīryaś cāvarajo
 nāmnā citrāṅgado hataḥ
yasyāṁ parāśarāt sākṣād
 avatīrṇo hareḥ kalā|veda-gupto muniḥ kṛṣṇo
 yato ’ham idam adhyagām
hitvā sva-śiṣyān pailādīn
 bhagavān bādarāyaṇaḥ|mahyaṁ putrāya śāntāya
 paraṁ guhyam idaṁ jagau
vicitravīryo ’thovāha
 kāśīrāja-sute balāt|svayaṁvarād upānīte
 ambikāmbālike ubhe
tayor āsakta-hṛdayo
 gṛhīto yakṣmaṇā mṛtaḥ|
230.ldw_fc: vicitravīryaḥ ; ca ; avarajaḥ ; nāmnā ; citrāṅgadaḥ ; hataḥ ; yasyām ; parāśarāt ; sākṣāt ; avatīrṇaḥ ; hareḥ ; kalā ; veda-guptaḥ ; muniḥ ; kṛṣṇaḥ ; yataḥ ; aham ; idam ; adhyagām ; hitvā ; sva-śiṣyān ; paila-ādīn ; bhagavān ; bādarāyaṇaḥ ; mahyam ; putrāya ; śāntāya ; param ; guhyam ; idam ; jagau ; vicitravīryaḥ ; atha ; uvāha ; kāśīrāja-sute ; balāt ; svayaṁvarāt ; upānīte ; ambikā-ambālike ; ubhe ; tayoḥ ; āsakta ; hṛdayaḥ ; gṛhītaḥ ; yakṣmaṇā ; mṛtaḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: Vicitravīrya, the son of Śāntanu; and; the younger brother; by a Gandharva named Citrāṅgada; Citrāṅgada; was killed; in the womb of Satyavatī previous to her marriage to Śāntanu; by the semen of Parāśara Muni; directly; incarnated; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; expansion; the protector of the Vedas; the great sage; Kṛṣṇa Dvaipāyana; from whom; I (Śukadeva Gosvāmī); this (Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam); studied thoroughly; rejecting; his disciples; headed by Paila; the incarnation of the Lord; Vyāsadeva; unto me; a son; who was truly controlled from sense gratification; the supreme; the most confidential; this Vedic literature (Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam); instructed; Vicitravīrya; thereafter; married; two daughters of Kāśīrāja; by force; from the arena of the svayaṁvara; being brought; Ambikā and Ambālikā; both of them; unto them; being too attached; his heart; being contaminated; by tuberculosis; he died.;
230.yw_zh: 祺创嘎达的弟弟是维祺陀维亚，祺创嘎达本人被也叫祺创嘎达的歌仙杀死。萨提亚娃缇在嫁给商塔努之前， 曾经由帕尔沙尔·牟尼授精，生下韦达经的权威编纂者维亚萨戴瓦一一奎师那-兑帕亚纳。我(舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米)由维亚萨戴瓦生下，主从他那里学习《圣典博伽瓦谭》这部非凡的文学巨著。首神的化身韦达维亚萨因为我毫无物质欲望，所以拒绝以派拉为首的他的门徒，却将《圣典博伽瓦谭》传授给我。当卡希王的两个女儿安碧卡和安芭莉卡，被强行从选夫竞技场上带走后，维祺陀维亚娶了她们，但由于他太依恋这两个妻子，他心脏病发作，最后死于肺结核。
230.yw_en: Citrāṅgada, of whom Vicitravīrya was the younger brother, was killed by a Gandharva who was also named Citrāṅgada. Satyavatī, before her marriage to Śāntanu, gave birth to the master authority of the Vedas, Vyāsadeva, known as Kṛṣṇa Dvaipāyana, who was begotten by Parāśara Muni. From Vyāsadeva, I [Śukadeva Gosvāmī] was born, and from him I studied this great work of literature, Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam. The incarnation of Godhead Vedavyāsa, rejecting his disciples, headed by Paila, instructed Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam to me because I was free from all material desires. After Ambikā and Ambālikā, the two daughters of Kāśīrāja, were taken away by force, Vicitravīrya married them, but because he was too attached to these two wives, he had a heart attack and died of tuberculosis.

230.ldw:
kṣetre ’prajasya vai bhrātur
 mātrokto bādarāyaṇaḥ
dhṛtarāṣṭraṁ ca pāṇḍuṁ ca
 viduraṁ cāpy ajījanat|
230.ldw_fc: kṣetre ; aprajasya ; vai ; bhrātuḥ ; mātrā uktaḥ ; bādarāyaṇaḥ ; dhṛtarāṣṭram ; ca ; pāṇḍum ; ca ; viduram ; ca ; api ; ajījanat ;
230.words_en_fc: in the wives and maidservant; of Vicitravīrya, who had no progeny; indeed; of the brother; being ordered by the mother; Vedavyāsa; a son named Dhṛtarāṣṭra; and; a son named Pāṇḍu; also; a son named Vidura; also; indeed; begot.;
230.yw_zh: 巴达茹阿亚纳一一圣维亚萨戴瓦，遵从他母亲萨堤亚娃缇的命令生了三个儿子，两个是与他弟弟维祺陀维亚的妻子安碧卡和安芭莉卡生的，第三个是奥维祺陀维亚的女仆生的。这些儿子是兑塔瓦施陀、潘杜和维杜茹阿。
230.yw_en: Bādarāyaṇa, Śrī Vyāsadeva, following the order of his mother, Satyavatī, begot three sons, two by the womb of Ambikā and Ambālikā, the two wives of his brother Vicitravīrya, and the third by Vicitravīrya’s maidservant. These sons were Dhṛtarāṣṭra, Pāṇḍu and Vidura.
230.yz_zh:
维祺陀维亚死于结核病，他的妻子安碧卡和安芭莉卡没生孩子。为此，维祺陀维亚的母亲萨提亚娃缇，在他死后去找也是她儿子的维亚萨戴瓦，要求维亚萨戴瓦与维祺陀维亚的妻子生孩子。在过去的年代中，丈夫的兄弟可以透过兄弟媳妇的子宫生孩子(devarena sutotpatti)。如果作丈夫的因为某种原因无法生孩，他的兄弟就可以透过兄弟媳妇的子宫生孩子。但在喀历年代中，这种做法，以及马祭和乳牛祭都是被禁止的。

“在这个喀历年代中，有五种活动受到禁止:在祭祀中献祭马匹，在祭祀中献祭乳牛，当托钵僧，给祖先供奉肉，以及与自己的兄弟之妻生孩子。”(《布茹阿玛-外瓦尔塔往世书》)
230.yz_en:
Vicitravīrya died of tuberculosis, and his wives, Ambikā and Ambālikā, had no issue. Therefore, after Vicitravīrya’s death, his mother, Satyavatī, who was also the mother of Vyāsadeva, asked Vyāsadeva to beget children through the wives of Vicitravīrya. In those days, the brother of the husband could beget children through the womb of his sister-in-law. This was known as devareṇa sutotpatti. If the husband was somehow unable to beget children, his brother could do so through the womb of his sister-in-law. This devareṇa sutotpatti and the sacrifices of aśvamedha and gomedha are forbidden in the Age of Kali.

aśvamedhaṁ gavālambhaṁ
 sannyāsaṁ pala-paitṛkam
devareṇa sutotpattiṁ
 kalau pañca vivarjayet

“In this Age of Kali, five acts are forbidden: the offering of a horse in sacrifice, the offering of a cow in sacrifice, the acceptance of the order of sannyāsa, the offering of oblations of flesh to the forefathers, and a man’s begetting children in his brother’s wife.” (Brahma-vaivarta Purāṇa).

230.ldw:
gāndhāryāṁ dhṛtarāṣṭrasya
 jajñe putra-śataṁ nṛpa
tatra duryodhano jyeṣṭho
 duḥśalā cāpi kanyakā|
230.ldw_fc: gāndhāryām ; dhṛtarāṣṭrasya ; jajñe ; putra-śatam ; nṛpa ; tatra ; duryodhanaḥ ; jyeṣṭhaḥ ; duḥśalā ; ca api ; kanyakā ;
230.words_en_fc: in the womb of Gāndhārī; of Dhṛtarāṣṭra; were born; one hundred sons; O King Parīkṣit; among the sons; the son named Duryodhana; the eldest; Duḥśalā; also; one daughter.;
230.yw_zh: 君王啊!兑塔瓦施陀的妻子甘妲瑞生下一百个儿子和一个女儿。长子是杜尤丹，女儿名叫杜莎拉。
230.yw_en: Dhṛtarāṣṭra’s wife, Gāndhārī, gave birth to one hundred sons and one daughter, O King. The oldest of the sons was Duryodhana, and the daughter’s name was Duḥśalā.

230.ldw:
śāpān maithuna-ruddhasya
 pāṇḍoḥ kuntyāṁ mahā-rathāḥ
jātā dharmānilendrebhyo
 yudhiṣṭhira-mukhās trayaḥ|nakulaḥ sahadevaś ca
 mādryāṁ nāsatya-dasrayoḥ
draupadyāṁ pañca pañcabhyaḥ
 putrās te pitaro ’bhavan|
230.ldw_fc: śāpāt ; maithuna-ruddhasya ; pāṇḍoḥ ; kuntyām ; mahā-rathāḥ ; jātāḥ ; dharma ; anila ; indrebhyaḥ ; yudhiṣṭhira ; mukhāḥ ; trayaḥ ; nakulaḥ ; sahadevaḥ ; ca ; mādryām ; nāsatya-dasrayoḥ ; draupadyām ; pañca ; pañcabhyaḥ ; putrāḥ ; te ; pitaraḥ ; abhavan ;
230.words_en_fc: due to being cursed; who had to restrain sexual life; of Pāṇḍu; in the womb of Kuntī; great heroes; took birth; by Mahārāja Dharma, or Dharmarāja; by the demigod controlling the wind; and by the demigod Indra, the controller of rain; Yudhiṣṭhira; headed by; three sons (Yudhiṣṭhira, Bhīma and Arjuna); Nakula; Sahadeva; also; in the womb of Mādrī; by Nāsatya and Dasra, the Aśvinī-kumāras; in the womb of Draupadī; five; from the five brothers (Yudhiṣṭhira, Bhīma, Arjuna, Nakula and Sahadeva); sons; they; uncles; became.;
230.yw_zh: 潘杜因为受到一位圣人的诅咒而受限制不能过性生活，因此他的三个儿子一一尤帝士提尔、彼玛和阿尔诸纳，分别是宗教之王、风神和雨神与他妻子琨缇生的。潘杜的第二位妻子玛德瑞生下纳库拉和萨哈戴瓦，他们是由阿施维尼一库玛尔两兄弟授精生下。这五兄弟以尤帝士提尔为首，与朵帕蒂共生了五个儿子。这五个儿子就是你叔叔。
230.yw_en: Pāṇḍu was restrained from sexual life because of having been cursed by a sage, and therefore his three sons Yudhiṣṭhira, Bhīma and Arjuna were begotten through the womb of his wife, Kuntī, by Dharmarāja, by the demigod controlling the wind, and by the demigod controlling the rain. Pāṇḍu’s second wife, Mādrī, gave birth to Nakula and Sahadeva, who were begotten by the two Aśvinī-kumāras. The five brothers, headed by Yudhiṣṭhira, begot five sons through the womb of Draupadī. These five sons were your uncles.

230.ldw:
yudhiṣṭhirāt prativindhyaḥ
 śrutaseno vṛkodarāt
arjunāc chrutakīrtis tu
 śatānīkas tu nākuliḥ|
230.ldw_fc: yudhiṣṭhirāt ; prativindhyaḥ ; śrutasenaḥ ; vṛkodarāt ; arjunāt ; śrutakīrtiḥ ; tu ; śatānīkaḥ ; tu ; nākuliḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: from Mahārāja Yudhiṣṭhira; a son named Prativindhya; Śrutasena; begotten by Bhīma; from Arjuna; a son named Śrutakīrti; indeed; a son named Śatānīka; indeed; of Nakula.;
230.yw_zh: 尤帝士提尔生的儿子名叫帕提温迪亚，彼玛生的儿子名叫施茹塔森纳，阿尔诸纳的儿子名叫施茹塔克尔提， 纳库拉的儿子名叫沙塔尼卡。
230.yw_en: From Yudhiṣṭhira came a son named Prativindhya, from Bhīma a son named Śrutasena, from Arjuna a son named Śrutakīrti, and from Nakula a son named Śatānīka.

230.ldw:
sahadeva-suto rājañ
 chrutakarmā tathāpare
yudhiṣṭhirāt tu pauravyāṁ
 devako ’tha ghaṭotkacaḥ|bhīmasenād dhiḍimbāyāṁ
 kālyāṁ sarvagatas tataḥ
sahadevāt suhotraṁ tu
 vijayāsūta pārvatī|
230.ldw_fc: sahadeva-sutaḥ ; rājan ; śrutakarmā ; tathā ; apare ; yudhiṣṭhirāt ; tu ; pauravyām ; devakaḥ ; atha ; ghaṭotkacaḥ ; bhīmasenāt ; hiḍimbāyām ; kālyām ; sarvagataḥ ; tataḥ ; sahadevāt ; suhotram ; tu ; vijayā ; asūta ; pārvatī ;
230.words_en_fc: the son of Sahadeva; O King; Śrutakarmā; as well as; others; from Yudhiṣṭhira; indeed; in the womb of Pauravī; a son named Devaka; as well as; Ghaṭotkaca; from Bhīmasena; in the womb of Hiḍimbā; in the womb of Kālī; Sarvagata; thereafter; from Sahadeva; Suhotra; indeed; Vijayā; gave birth to; the daughter of the Himālayan king.;
230.yw_zh: 君王啊！萨哈戴瓦的儿子名叫施茹塔卡尔玛。除他们之外，尤帝士提尔和他弟弟与他们的其他妻子生了另外一些儿子。尤帝士提尔与他妻子袍茹阿薇生了戴瓦卡;彼玛森纳与他名叫黑丁芭的妻子生下嘎陀卡查，与妻子卡莉生了萨尔瓦嘎塔。同样，萨哈戴瓦与他妻子薇嘉雅一一山脉之王喜马拉雅的女儿，生了苏厚陀。
230.yw_en: O King, the son of Sahadeva was Śrutakarmā. Furthermore, Yudhiṣṭhira and his brothers begot other sons in other wives. Yudhiṣṭhira begot a son named Devaka through the womb of Pauravī, and Bhīmasena begot a son named Ghaṭotkaca through his wife Hiḍimbā and a son named Sarvagata through his wife Kālī. Similarly, Sahadeva had a son named Suhotra through his wife named Vijayā, who was the daughter of the king of the mountains.

230.ldw:
kareṇumatyāṁ nakulo
 naramitraṁ tathārjunaḥ
irāvantam ulupyāṁ vai
 sutāyāṁ babhruvāhanam
maṇipura-pateḥ so ’pi
 tat-putraḥ putrikā-sutaḥ|
230.ldw_fc: kareṇumatyām ; nakulaḥ ; naramitram ; tathā ; arjunaḥ ; irāvantam ; ulupyām ; vai ; sutāyām ; babhruvāhanam ; maṇipura-pateḥ ; saḥ ; api ; tat-putraḥ ; putrikā-sutaḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: in the wife named Kareṇumatī; Nakula; a son named Naramitra; also; Arjuna; Irāvān; in the womb of the Nāga-kanyā named Ulupī; indeed; in the daughter; a son named Babhruvāhana; of the king of Maṇipura; he; although; the son of Arjuna; the son of his maternal grandfather.;
230.yw_zh: 纳库拉与他妻子卡蕊努玛缇生了纳茹阿弥陀。同样，阿尔诸纳与他名叫乌露琵的妻子一一巨蛇的女儿，生下依茹阿万;与玛尼普尔的公主生了巴布茹瓦汉。巴布茹瓦汉抚养了玛尼普尔君王的儿子。
230.yw_en: Nakula begot a son named Naramitra through his wife named Kareṇumatī. Similarly, Arjuna begot a son named Irāvān through his wife known as Ulupī, the daughter of the Nāgas, and a son named Babhruvāhana by the womb of the princess of Maṇipura. Babhruvāhana became the adopted son of the king of Maṇipura.
230.yz_zh: 要明白的是:帕尔娃缇(Parvati)是名叫玛尼普尔的十分古老的山城之王的女儿。五千年前，当潘达瓦五兄弟统治时，玛尼普尔及其国王就存在于世。因此，这是一个十分古老的王国，是高贵的外士纳瓦王国。如果这个王国是作为外士纳瓦国组建的，那么外士纳瓦精神的复兴就会取得巨大的成功，因为五千年来，这个国家仍保持着它的特性。如果外士纳瓦精神能在那里复兴，它将成为一个神奇的地方，将闻名全世界。玛尼普尔的外士纳瓦在外士纳瓦社会中十分著名。在温达文(Vrndavana)和纳瓦兑帕(Navadvipa)地区，有许多玛尼普尔君王兴建的神庙。我们有些奉献者就来自玛尼普尔。因此，奎师那意识运动可以靠有奎师那意识的奉献者的精诚合作，在玛尼普尔很好地传播。
230.yz_en: It is to be understood that Pārvatī is the daughter of the king of the very, very old mountainous country known as the Maṇipura state. Five thousand years ago, therefore, when the Pāṇḍavas ruled, Maṇipura existed, as did its king. Therefore this kingdom is a very old, aristocratic Vaiṣṇava kingdom. If this kingdom is organized as a Vaiṣṇava state, this revitalization will be a great success because for five thousand years this state has maintained its identity. If the Vaiṣṇava spirit is revived there, it will be a wonderful place, renowned throughout the entire world. Maṇipuri Vaiṣṇavas are very famous in Vaiṣṇava society. In Vṛndāvana and Navadvīpa there are many temples constructed by the king of Maṇipura. Some of our devotees belong to the Maṇipura state. The Kṛṣṇa consciousness movement, therefore, can be well spread in the state of Maṇipura by the cooperative efforts of the Kṛṣṇa conscious devotees.

230.ldw:
tava tātaḥ subhadrāyām
 abhimanyur ajāyata
sarvātirathajid vīra
 uttarāyāṁ tato bhavān|
230.ldw_fc: tava ; tātaḥ ; subhadrāyām ; abhimanyuḥ ; ajāyata ; sarva-atiratha-jit ; vīraḥ ; uttarāyām ; tataḥ ; bhavān ;
230.words_en_fc: your; father; in the womb of Subhadrā; Abhimanyu; was born; a great fighter who could defeat the atirathas; a great hero; in the womb of Uttarā; from Abhimanyu; your good self.;
230.yw_zh: 我亲爱的帕瑞克西特王，你父亲阿比曼纽由阿尔诸纳和苏芭朵所生。他能征服所有的阿提茹阿塔战将(以一对一千个战车斗士的战将)。他与维茹阿铎佳的女儿乌塔茹阿生了你。
230.yw_en: My dear King Parīkṣit, your father, Abhimanyu, was born from the womb of Subhadrā as the son of Arjuna. He was the conqueror of all atirathas [those who could fight with one thousand charioteers]. From him, by the womb of Uttarā, the daughter of Virāḍrāja, you were born.

230.ldw:
parikṣīṇeṣu kuruṣu
 drauṇer brahmāstra-tejasā
tvaṁ ca kṛṣṇānubhāvena
 sajīvo mocito ’ntakāt|
230.ldw_fc: parikṣīṇeṣu ; kuruṣu ; drauṇeḥ ; brahmāstra-tejasā ; tvam ca ; kṛṣṇa-anubhāvena ; sajīvaḥ ; mocitaḥ ; antakāt ;
230.words_en_fc: because of being annihilated in the Kurukṣetra war; the members of the Kuru dynasty, such as Duryodhana; Aśvatthāmā, the son of Droṇācārya; because of the heat of the brahmāstra nuclear weapon; your good self also; because of the mercy of Lord Kṛṣṇa; with your life; released; from death.;
230.yw_zh: 库茹王朝在库茹柴陀战场上被毁灭后，你也差点就被朵纳查尔亚的儿子发射的布茹阿玛斯陀核武器所杀。但凭至尊人格首神奎师那的仁慈，你得到拯救，免于一死。
230.yw_en: After the Kuru dynasty was annihilated in the Battle of Kurukṣetra, you also were about to be destroyed by the brahmāstra atomic weapon released by the son of Droṇācārya, but by the mercy of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Kṛṣṇa, you were saved from death.

230.ldw:
taveme tanayās tāta
 janamejaya-pūrvakāḥ
śrutaseno bhīmasena
 ugrasenaś ca vīryavān|
230.ldw_fc: tava ; ime ; tanayāḥ ; tāta ; janamejaya ; pūrvakāḥ ; śrutasenaḥ ; bhīmasenaḥ ; ugrasenaḥ ; ca ; vīryavān ;
230.words_en_fc: your; all these; sons; my dear King Parīkṣit; Janamejaya; headed by; Śrutasena; Bhīmasena; Ugrasena; also; all very powerful.;
230.yw_zh: 我亲爱的君王，你的四个儿子一一佳纳梅佳亚、施茹塔森纳、彼玛森纳和乌卦森纳，都很强大有力，其中佳纳梅佳亚是长子。
230.yw_en: My dear King, your four sons — Janamejaya, Śrutasena, Bhīmasena and Ugrasena — are very powerful. Janamejaya is the eldest.

230.ldw:
janamejayas tvāṁ viditvā
 takṣakān nidhanaṁ gatam
sarpān vai sarpa-yāgāgnau
 sa hoṣyati ruṣānvitaḥ|
230.ldw_fc: janamejayaḥ ; tvām ; viditvā ; takṣakāt ; nidhanam ; gatam ; sarpān ; vai ; sarpa-yāga-agnau ; saḥ ; hoṣyati ; ruṣā-anvitaḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: the eldest son; about you; knowing; by the Takṣaka serpent; death; undergone; the snakes; indeed; in the fire of the sacrifice for killing all the snakes; he (Janamejaya); will offer as a sacrifice; because of being very angry.;
230.yw_zh: 由于塔克沙卡巨蛇造成你的死亡，你儿子佳纳梅佳亚将非常愤怒，将举行一场消灭这世上所有的蛇的祭祀。
230.yw_en: Because of your death by the Takṣaka snake, your son Janamejaya will be very angry and will perform a sacrifice to kill all the snakes in the world.

230.ldw:
kālaṣeyaṁ purodhāya
 turaṁ turaga-medhaṣāṭ
samantāt pṛthivīṁ sarvāṁ
 jitvā yakṣyati cādhvaraiḥ|
230.ldw_fc: kālaṣeyam ; purodhāya ; turam ; turaga-medhaṣāṭ ; samantāt ; pṛthivīm ; sarvām ; jitvā ; yakṣyati ; ca ; adhvaraiḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: the son of Kalaṣa; accepting as the priest; Tura; he will be known as Turaga-medhaṣāṭ (a performer of many horse sacrifices); including all parts; the world; everywhere; conquering; will execute sacrifices; and; by performing aśvamedha-yajñas.;
230.yw_zh: 佳纳梅佳亚在征服全世界，并接受卡拉沙的儿子图茹阿当他的祭司后，将举行马祭，并因为这些马祭而被称为多场马祭的举行者。
230.yw_en: After conquering throughout the world and after accepting Tura, the son of Kalaṣa, as his priest, Janamejaya will perform aśvamedha-yajñas, for which he will be known as Turaga-medhaṣāṭ.

230.ldw:
tasya putraḥ śatānīko
 yājñavalkyāt trayīṁ paṭhan
astra-jñānaṁ kriyā-jñānaṁ
 śaunakāt param eṣyati|
230.ldw_fc: tasya ; putraḥ ; śatānīkaḥ ; yājñavalkyāt ; trayīm ; paṭhan ; astra-jñānam ; kriyā-jñānam ; śaunakāt ; param ; eṣyati ;
230.words_en_fc: of Janamejaya; the son; Śatānīka; from the great sage known as Yājñavalkya; the three Vedas (Sāma, Yajur and Ṛg); studying thoroughly; the art of military administration; the art of performing ritualistic ceremonies; from Śaunaka Ṛṣi; transcendental knowledge; will achieve.;
230.yw_zh: 佳纳梅佳亚的儿子沙塔尼卡，将拜雅格亚瓦勒克亚为师，学习三部韦达经，以及举行仪式性典礼的艺术。他还将拜奎帕查尔亚为师，学习军事技术;向圣人绍纳卡学习超然的科学。
230.yw_en: The son of Janamejaya known as Śatānīka will learn from Yājñavalkya the three Vedas and the art of performing ritualistic ceremonies. He will also learn the military art from Kṛpācārya and the transcendental science from the sage Śaunaka.

230.ldw:
sahasrānīkas tat-putras
 tataś caivāśvamedhajaḥ
asīmakṛṣṇas tasyāpi
 nemicakras tu tat-sutaḥ|
230.ldw_fc: sahasrānīkaḥ ; tat-putraḥ ; tataḥ ; ca ; eva ; aśvamedhajaḥ ; asīmakṛṣṇaḥ ; tasya ; api ; nemicakraḥ ; tu ; tat-sutaḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: Sahasrānīka; the son of Śatānīka; from him (Sahasrānīka); also; indeed; Aśvamedhaja; Asīmakṛṣṇa; from him (Aśvamedhaja); also; Nemicakra; indeed; his son.;
230.yw_zh: 沙塔尼卡的儿子将是萨哈刷尼卡，萨哈刷尼卡将生子阿刷梅达佳。阿刷梅达佳的儿子将是阿希玛奎师那，阿希玛奎师那将成为内弥查夸的父亲。
230.yw_en: The son of Śatānīka will be Sahasrānīka, and from him will come the son named Aśvamedhaja. From Aśvamedhaja will come Asīmakṛṣṇa, and his son will be Nemicakra.

230.ldw:
gajāhvaye hṛte nadyā
 kauśāmbyāṁ sādhu vatsyati
uktas tataś citrarathas
 tasmāc chucirathaḥ sutaḥ|
230.ldw_fc: gajāhvaye ; hṛte ; nadyā ; kauśāmbyām ; sādhu ; vatsyati ; uktaḥ ; tataḥ ; citrarathaḥ ; tasmāt ; śucirathaḥ ; sutaḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: on the town of Hastināpura (New Delhi); being inundated; by the river; in the place known as Kauśāmbī; duly; will live there; celebrated; thereafter; Citraratha; from him; Śuciratha; the son.;
230.yw_zh: 当哈斯提纳普尔城镇(新德里)被河水淹没时，内弥查夸将住在名叫考商彼的地方。他的儿子将以祺陀茹阿塔闻名于世，祺陀茹阿塔的儿子将是舒祺茹阿塔。
230.yw_en: When the town of Hastināpura [New Delhi] is inundated by the river, Nemicakra will live in the place known as Kauśāmbī. His son will be celebrated as Citraratha, and the son of Citraratha will be Śuciratha.

230.ldw:
tasmāc ca vṛṣṭimāṁs tasya
 suṣeṇo ’tha mahīpatiḥ
sunīthas tasya bhavitā
 nṛcakṣur yat sukhīnalaḥ|
230.ldw_fc: tasmāt ; ca ; vṛṣṭimān ; tasya ; suṣeṇaḥ ; atha ; mahī-patiḥ ; sunīthaḥ ; tasya ; bhavitā ; nṛcakṣuḥ ; yat ; sukhīnalaḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: from him (Śuciratha); also; the son known as Vṛṣṭimān; his (son); Suṣeṇa; thereafter; the emperor of the whole world; Sunītha; his; will be; his son, Nṛcakṣu; from him; Sukhīnala.;
230.yw_zh: 舒祺茹阿塔将生子维施提曼，维施提曼的儿子苏申纳将成为整个世界的帝王。苏申纳的儿子将是苏尼塔，苏尼塔将是尼瑞查克舒的父亲，而尼瑞查克舒将生子苏克依纳拉。
230.yw_en: From Śuciratha will come the son named Vṛṣṭimān, and his son, Suṣeṇa, will be the emperor of the entire world. The son of Suṣeṇa will be Sunītha, his son will be Nṛcakṣu, and from Nṛcakṣu will come a son named Sukhīnala.

230.ldw:
pariplavaḥ sutas tasmān
 medhāvī sunayātmajaḥ
nṛpañjayas tato dūrvas
 timis tasmāj janiṣyati|
230.ldw_fc: pariplavaḥ ; sutaḥ ; tasmāt ; medhāvī ; sunaya-ātmajaḥ ; nṛpañjayaḥ ; tataḥ ; dūrvaḥ ; timiḥ ; tasmāt ; janiṣyati ;
230.words_en_fc: Pariplava; the son; from him (Pariplava); Medhāvī; the son of Sunaya; Nṛpañjaya; from him; Dūrva; Timi; from him; will take birth.;
230.yw_zh: 苏克依纳拉的儿子将是帕瑞普拉瓦，帕瑞普拉瓦将生子苏纳亚。苏纳亚将有个名叫梅达维的儿子，梅达维将成为尼瑞潘佳亚的父亲。尼瑞潘佳亚的儿子是杜尔瓦，杜尔瓦将生子提弥。
230.yw_en: The son of Sukhīnala will be Pariplava, and his son will be Sunaya. From Sunaya will come a son named Medhāvī; from Medhāvī, Nṛpañjaya; from Nṛpañjaya, Dūrva; and from Dūrva, Timi.

230.ldw:
timer bṛhadrathas tasmāc
 chatānīkaḥ sudāsajaḥ
śatānīkād durdamanas
 tasyāpatyaṁ mahīnaraḥ|
230.ldw_fc: timeḥ ; bṛhadrathaḥ ; tasmāt ; śatānīkaḥ ; sudāsa-jaḥ ; śatānīkāt ; durdamanaḥ ; tasya apatyam ; mahīnaraḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: of Timi; Bṛhadratha; from him (Bṛhadratha); Śatānīka; the son of Sudāsa; from Śatānīka; a son named Durdamana; his son; Mahīnara.;
230.yw_zh: 提弥将生下毕尔哈铎塔，毕尔哈铎塔的儿子将是苏达斯，而苏达斯将成为沙塔尼卡的父亲。沙塔尼卡的儿子将是杜尔达玛纳，杜尔达玛纳将生子玛黑纳茹阿。
230.yw_en: From Timi will come Bṛhadratha; from Bṛhadratha, Sudāsa; and from Sudāsa, Śatānīka. From Śatānīka will come Durdamana, and from him will come a son named Mahīnara.

230.ldw:
daṇḍapāṇir nimis tasya
 kṣemako bhavitā yataḥ
brahma-kṣatrasya vai yonir
 vaṁśo devarṣi-satkṛtaḥ|kṣemakaṁ prāpya rājānaṁ
 saṁsthāṁ prāpsyati vai kalau
atha māgadha-rājāno
 bhāvino ye vadāmi te|
230.ldw_fc: daṇḍapāṇiḥ ; nimiḥ ; tasya ; kṣemakaḥ ; bhavitā ; yataḥ ; brahma-kṣatrasya ; vai ; yoniḥ ; vaṁśaḥ ; deva-ṛṣi-satkṛtaḥ ; kṣemakam ; prāpya ; rājānam ; saṁsthām ; prāpsyati ; vai ; kalau ; atha ; māgadha-rājānaḥ ; bhāvinaḥ ; ye ; vadāmi ; te ;
230.words_en_fc: Daṇḍapāṇi; Nimi; from him (Mahīnara); a son named Kṣemaka; will take birth; from whom (Nimi); of brāhmaṇas and kṣatriyas; indeed; the source; the dynasty; respected by great saintly persons and demigods; King Kṣemaka; up to this point; the monarch; an end to them; there will be; indeed; in this Kali-yuga; thereafter; the kings in the Māgadha dynasty; the future; all those who; I shall explain; unto you.;
230.yw_zh: 玛黑纳茹阿的儿子将是丹达帕尼，丹达帕尼将生子尼弥，尼弥将是克舍玛卡王的父亲。到此为止，我给你介绍了月亮神的王朝，这王朝是布茹阿玛纳和查锤亚的来源， 受到半神人和大圣人的崇拜。在这个喀历年代中，克舍玛卡将是最后的君主。现在，请听我给你介绍玛嘎达王朝的未来。
230.yw_en: The son of Mahīnara will be Daṇḍapāṇi, and his son will be Nimi, from whom King Kṣemaka will be born. I have now described to you the moon-god’s dynasty, which is the source of brāhmaṇas and kṣatriyas and is worshiped by demigods and great saints. In this Kali-yuga, Kṣemaka will be the last monarch. Now I shall describe to you the future of the Māgadha dynasty. Please listen.

230.ldw:
bhavitā sahadevasya
 mārjārir yac chrutaśravāḥ
tato yutāyus tasyāpi
 niramitro ’tha tat-sutaḥ|sunakṣatraḥ sunakṣatrād
 bṛhatseno ’tha karmajit
tataḥ sutañjayād vipraḥ
 śucis tasya bhaviṣyati|kṣemo ’tha suvratas tasmād
 dharmasūtraḥ samas tataḥ
dyumatseno ’tha sumatiḥ
 subalo janitā tataḥ|
230.ldw_fc: bhavitā ; sahadevasya ; mārjāriḥ ; yat ; śrutaśravāḥ ; tataḥ ; yutāyuḥ ; tasya ; api ; niramitraḥ ; atha ; tat-sutaḥ ; sunakṣatraḥ ; sunakṣatrāt ; bṛhatsenaḥ ; atha ; karmajit ; tataḥ ; sutañjayāt ; vipraḥ ; śuciḥ ; tasya ; bhaviṣyati ; kṣemaḥ ; atha ; suvrataḥ ; tasmāt ; dharmasūtraḥ ; samaḥ ; tataḥ ; dyumatsenaḥ ; atha ; sumatiḥ ; subalaḥ ; janitā ; tataḥ ;
230.words_en_fc: will take birth; the son of Sahadeva; Mārjāri; his son; Śrutaśravā; from him; Yutāyu; his son; also; Niramitra; thereafter; his son; Sunakṣatra; from Sunakṣatra; Bṛhatsena; from him; Karmajit; from him; from Sutañjaya; Vipra; a son named Śuci; from him; will take birth; a son named Kṣema; thereafter; a son named Suvrata; from him; Dharmasūtra; Sama; from him; Dyumatsena; thereafter; Sumati; Subala; will take birth; thereafter.;
230.yw_zh: 佳尔桑达的儿子萨哈戴瓦，将有一个名叫玛尔佳瑞的儿子。玛尔佳瑞将生子施茹塔刷瓦，施茹塔刷瓦将成为尤塔佑的父亲，尤塔佑的儿子将是尼茹阿弥陀。尼茹阿弥陀将生子苏纳查陀，苏纳查陀将是毕尔哈特森纳的父亲，毕尔哈特森纳的儿子将是卡尔玛吉特。卡尔玛吉特将有个儿子名叫苏坦佳亚，苏坦佳亚的儿子将是维帕，维帕将是舒祺的父亲。舒祺将生子克舍玛，克舍玛将是苏瓦塔的父亲，苏瓦塔的儿子将是达尔玛苏陀。达尔玛苏陀将生子萨玛，萨玛的儿子将是丢玛特森纳。丢玛特森纳将是苏玛提的父亲，苏玛提将生子苏巴拉。
230.yw_en: Sahadeva, the son of Jarāsandha, will have a son named Mārjāri. From Mārjāri will come Śrutaśravā; from Śrutaśravā, Yutāyu; and from Yutāyu, Niramitra. The son of Niramitra will be Sunakṣatra, from Sunakṣatra will come Bṛhatsena, and from Bṛhatsena, Karmajit. The son of Karmajit will be Sutañjaya, the son of Sutañjaya will be Vipra, and his son will be Śuci. The son of Śuci will be Kṣema, the son of Kṣema will be Suvrata, and the son of Suvrata will be Dharmasūtra. From Dharmasūtra will come Sama; from Sama, Dyumatsena; from Dyumatsena, Sumati; and from Sumati, Subala.

230.ldw:
sunīthaḥ satyajid atha
 viśvajid yad ripuñjayaḥ
bārhadrathāś ca bhūpālā
 bhāvyāḥ sāhasra-vatsaram|
230.ldw_fc: sunīthaḥ ; satyajit ; atha ; viśvajit ; yat ; ripuñjayaḥ ; bārhadrathāḥ ; ca ; bhūpālāḥ ; bhāvyāḥ ; sāhasra-vatsaram ;
230.words_en_fc: from Subala will come Sunītha; Satyajit; from him; from Viśvajit; from whom; Ripuñjaya; all in the line of Bṛhadratha; also; all those kings; will take birth; continuously for one thousand years.;
230.yw_zh: 苏巴拉的儿子将是苏尼塔，苏尼塔将生子萨提亚吉特;萨提亚吉特将是维施瓦吉特的父亲，维施瓦吉特将生子瑞彭佳亚。所有这些人物都将属于毕尔哈铎塔王朝，而这个王朝将统治世界一千年。
230.yw_en: From Subala will come Sunītha; from Sunītha, Satyajit; from Satyajit, Viśvajit; and from Viśvajit, Ripuñjaya. All of these personalities will belong to the dynasty of Bṛhadratha, which will rule the world for one thousand years.
230.yz_zh:
这是一个始于佳尔桑达并延续一千年的君主政体传承，上述是这王朝中君王的名单。

到此为止，结束了巴克提韦丹塔对《圣典博伽瓦谭》第9篇的第22章——”阿佳弥达的后代”所作的阐释。
230.yz_en:
This is the history of a monarchy that began with Jarāsandha and continues for one thousand years as the above-mentioned kings appear on the surface of the globe.

Thus end the Bhaktivedanta purports of the Ninth Canto, Twenty-second Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “The Descendants of Ajamīḍha.”

231.ldw:
śrī-śuka uvāca|anoḥ sabhānaraś cakṣuḥ
 pareṣṇuś ca trayaḥ sutāḥ
sabhānarāt kālanaraḥ
 sṛñjayas tat-sutas tataḥ|
231.ldw_fc: śrī-śukaḥ uvāca ; anoḥ ; sabhānaraḥ ; cakṣuḥ ; pareṣṇuḥ ; ca ; trayaḥ ; sutāḥ ; sabhānarāt ; kālanaraḥ ; sṛñjayaḥ ; tat-sutaḥ ; tataḥ ;
231.words_en_fc: Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said; of Anu, the fourth of the four sons of Yayāti; Sabhānara; Cakṣu; Pareṣṇu; also; three; sons; from Sabhānara; Kālanara; Sṛñjaya; son of Kālanara; thereafter.;
231.yw_zh: 舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米说:雅亚提的第四个儿子阿努有三个儿子，分别名叫萨巴纳茹阿、查克舒和帕瑞施努。 君王啊！萨巴纳茹阿生子卡拉纳茹阿，卡拉纳茹阿的儿子是逊佳亚。
231.yw_en: Śukadeva Gosvāmī said: Anu, the fourth son of Yayāti, had three sons, named Sabhānara, Cakṣu and Pareṣṇu. O King, from Sabhānara came a son named Kālanara, and from Kālanara came a son named Sṛñjaya.

231.ldw:
janamejayas tasya putro
 mahāśālo mahāmanāḥ
uśīnaras titikṣuś ca
 mahāmanasa ātmajau|
231.ldw_fc: janamejayaḥ ; tasya ; putraḥ ; mahāśālaḥ ; mahāmanāḥ ; uśīnaraḥ ; titikṣuḥ ; ca ; mahāmanasaḥ ; ātmajau ;
231.words_en_fc: Janamejaya; of him (Janamejaya); a son; Mahāśāla; (from Mahāśāla) a son named Mahāmanā; Uśīnara; Titikṣu; and; from Mahāmanā; two sons.;
231.yw_zh: 逊佳亚生的儿子名叫佳纳梅佳亚。佳亚梅佳亚生了玛哈沙拉。玛哈沙拉成为玛哈玛纳的父亲，而玛哈玛纳有两个儿子，分别是乌希纳尔和提缇克舒。
231.yw_en: From Sṛñjaya came a son named Janamejaya. From Janamejaya came Mahāśāla; from Mahāśāla, Mahāmanā; and from Mahāmanā two sons, named Uśīnara and Titikṣu.

231.ldw:
śibir varaḥ kṛmir dakṣaś
 catvārośīnarātmajāḥ
vṛṣādarbhaḥ sudhīraś ca
 madraḥ kekaya ātmavān|śibeś catvāra evāsaṁs
 titikṣoś ca ruṣadrathaḥ
tato homo ’tha sutapā
 baliḥ sutapaso ’bhavat|
231.ldw_fc: śibiḥ ; varaḥ ; kṛmiḥ ; dakṣaḥ ; catvāraḥ ; uśīnara-ātmajāḥ ; vṛṣādarbhaḥ ; sudhīraḥ ca ; madraḥ ; kekayaḥ ; ātmavān ; śibeḥ ; catvāraḥ ; eva ; āsan ; titikṣoḥ ; ca ; ruṣadrathaḥ ; tataḥ ; homaḥ ; atha ; sutapāḥ ; baliḥ ; sutapasaḥ ; abhavat ;
231.words_en_fc: Śibi; Vara; Kṛmi; Dakṣa; four; the sons of Uśīnara; Vṛṣādarbha; as well as Sudhīra; Madra; Kekaya; self-realized; of Śibi; four; indeed; there were; of Titikṣu; also; a son named Ruṣadratha; from him (Ruṣadratha); Homa; from him (Homa); Sutapā; Bali; of Sutapā; there was.;
231.yw_zh: 乌希纳尔的四个儿子分别名叫希比、瓦茹阿、奎弥和达克沙。希比也生了四个儿子，分别是维沙达尔巴、苏迪茹阿、玛铎和觉悟了自我的灵魂凯卡亚。提缇克舒的儿子是茹沙铎塔。茹沙铎塔生子侯玛，侯玛的儿子是苏塔帕。苏塔帕是巴利的父亲。
231.yw_en: The four sons of Uśīnara were Śibi, Vara, Kṛmi and Dakṣa, and from Śibi again came four sons, named Vṛṣādarbha, Sudhīra, Madra and ātma-tattva-vit Kekaya. The son of Titikṣu was Ruṣadratha. From Ruṣadratha came Homa; from Homa, Sutapā; and from Sutapā, Bali.

231.ldw:
aṅga-vaṅga-kaliṅgādyāḥ
 suhma-puṇḍrauḍra-saṁjñitāḥ
jajñire dīrghatamaso
 baleḥ kṣetre mahīkṣitaḥ|
231.ldw_fc: aṅga ; vaṅga ; kaliṅga ; ādyāḥ ; suhma ; puṇḍra ; oḍra ; saṁjñitāḥ ; jajñire ; dīrghatamasaḥ ; baleḥ ; kṣetre ; mahī-kṣitaḥ ;
231.words_en_fc: Aṅga; Vaṅga; Kaliṅga; headed by; Suhma; Puṇḍra; Oḍra; known as such; were born; by the semen of Dīrghatamā; of Bali; in the wife; of the king of the world.;
231.yw_zh: 世界帝王巴利的妻子，藉由迪尔嘎塔玛授予的精子，生下当了君王的六个儿子，他们分别是:安嘎、万嘎、卡霖嘎、苏赫玛、彭铎和欧铎。
231.yw_en: By the semen of Dīrghatamā in the wife of Bali, the emperor of the world, six sons took birth, namely Aṅga, Vaṅga, Kaliṅga, Suhma, Puṇḍra and Oḍra.

231.ldw:
cakruḥ sva-nāmnā viṣayān
 ṣaḍ imān prācyakāṁś ca te
khalapāno ’ṅgato jajñe
 tasmād divirathas tataḥ|
231.ldw_fc: cakruḥ ; sva-nāmnā ; viṣayān ; ṣaṭ ; imān ; prācyakān ca ; te ; khalapānaḥ ; aṅgataḥ ; jajñe ; tasmāt ; divirathaḥ ; tataḥ ;
231.words_en_fc: they created; by their own names; different states; six; all these; on the eastern side (of India); those (six kings); Khalapāna; from King Aṅga; took birth; from him (Khalapāna); Diviratha; thereafter.;
231.yw_zh: 以安嘎为首的这六个儿子，后来分别成为印度东部六个邦的君王。这些邦都按照统治它们的君王被命名。安嘎生的儿子名叫卡拉帕纳，卡拉帕纳生子迪维茹阿塔。
231.yw_en: These six sons, headed by Aṅga, later became kings of six states in the eastern side of India. These states were known according to the names of their respective kings. From Aṅga came a son named Khalapāna, and from Khalapāna came Diviratha.

231.ldw:
suto dharmaratho yasya
 jajñe citraratho ’prajāḥ
romapāda iti khyātas
 tasmai daśarathaḥ sakhā|śāntāṁ sva-kanyāṁ prāyacchad
 ṛṣyaśṛṅga uvāha yām
deve ’varṣati yaṁ rāmā
 āninyur hariṇī-sutam|nāṭya-saṅgīta-vāditrair
 vibhramāliṅganārhaṇaiḥ
sa tu rājño ’napatyasya
 nirūpyeṣṭiṁ marutvate|prajām adād daśaratho
 yena lebhe ’prajāḥ prajāḥ
caturaṅgo romapādāt
 pṛthulākṣas tu tat-sutaḥ|
231.ldw_fc: sutaḥ ; dharmarathaḥ ; yasya ; jajñe ; citrarathaḥ ; aprajāḥ ; romapādaḥ ; iti ; khyātaḥ ; tasmai ; daśarathaḥ ; sakhā ; śāntām ; sva-kanyām ; prāyacchat ; ṛṣyaśṛṅgaḥ ; uvāha ; yām ; deve ; avarṣati ; yam ; rāmāḥ ; āninyuḥ ; hariṇī-sutam ; nāṭya-saṅgīta-vāditraiḥ ; vibhrama ; āliṅgana ; arhaṇaiḥ ; saḥ ; tu ; rājñaḥ ; anapatyasya ; nirūpya ; iṣṭim ; marutvate ; prajām ; adāt ; daśarathaḥ ; yena ; lebhe ; aprajāḥ ; prajāḥ ; caturaṅgaḥ ; romapādāt ; pṛthulākṣaḥ ; tu ; tat-sutaḥ ;
231.words_en_fc: a son; Dharmaratha; of whom (Diviratha); was born; Citraratha; without any sons; Romapāda; thus; celebrated; unto him; Daśaratha; friend; Śāntā; Daśaratha’s own daughter; delivered; Ṛṣyaśṛṅga; married; unto her (Śāntā); the demigod in charge of rainfall; did not shower any rain; unto whom (Ṛṣyaśṛṅga); prostitutes; brought; that Ṛṣyaśṛṅga, who was the son of a doe; by dancing, by singing and by a musical display; bewildering; by embracing; by worshiping; he (Ṛṣyaśṛṅga); indeed; from Mahārāja Daśaratha; who was without issue; after establishing; a sacrifice; of the demigod named Marutvān; issue; delivered; Daśaratha; by which (as a result of the yajña); achieved; although he had no sons; sons; Caturaṅga; from Citraratha; Pṛthulākṣa; indeed; the son of Caturaṅga.;
231.yw_zh: 迪维茹阿塔的儿子是达尔玛茹阿塔，达尔玛茹阿塔的儿子则是以柔玛帕达闻名于世的祺陀茹阿塔。但柔玛帕达没有后代，他的朋友达沙茹阿塔王，因此将自己的女儿商塔过继给他。柔玛帕达将她视为己出，她后来嫁给了瑞夏舜嘎。当天堂星球的半神人不降雨时，一群富有魅力且擅长舞蹈和伴随音乐表演戏剧的艺妓，以拥抱并崇拜瑞夏舜嘎的方式，将他从森林中带出;他随后被指定为主持祭祀的祭司。 瑞夏舜嘎一旦到来，天就开始降雨。那之后，瑞夏舜嘎代表没有子嗣的达沙茹阿塔王，主持了一场赐予儿子的祭祀。达萨茹阿特王后来有了儿子。凭借瑞夏舜嘎的仁慈，桑玛帕达生了查图冉嘎，查图冉嘎的儿子是普瑞图拉克沙。
231.yw_en: From Diviratha came a son named Dharmaratha, and his son was Citraratha, who was celebrated as Romapāda. Romapāda, however, was without issue, and therefore his friend Mahārāja Daśaratha gave him his own daughter, named Śāntā. Romapāda accepted her as his daughter, and thereafter she married Ṛṣyaśṛṅga. When the demigods from the heavenly planets failed to shower rain, Ṛṣyaśṛṅga was appointed the priest for performing a sacrifice, after being brought from the forest by the allurement of prostitutes, who danced, staged theatrical performances accompanied by music, and embraced and worshiped him. After Ṛṣyaśṛṅga came, the rain fell. Thereafter, Ṛṣyaśṛṅga performed a son-giving sacrifice on behalf of Mahārāja Daśaratha, who had no issue, and then Mahārāja Daśaratha had sons. From Romapāda, by the mercy of Ṛṣyaśṛṅga, Caturaṅga was born, and from Caturaṅga came Pṛthulākṣa.

231.ldw:
bṛhadratho bṛhatkarmā
 bṛhadbhānuś ca tat-sutāḥ
ādyād bṛhanmanās tasmāj
 jayadratha udāhṛtaḥ|
231.ldw_fc: bṛhadrathaḥ ; bṛhatkarmā ; bṛhadbhānuḥ ; ca ; tat-sutāḥ ; ādyāt ; bṛhanmanāḥ ; tasmāt ; jayadrathaḥ ; udāhṛtaḥ ;
231.words_en_fc: Bṛhadratha; Bṛhatkarmā; Bṛhadbhānu; also; the sons of Pṛthulākṣa; from the eldest (Bṛhadratha); Bṛhanmanā was born; from him (Bṛhanmanā); a son named Jayadratha; celebrated as his son.;
231.yw_zh: 普瑞图拉克沙生子毕尔哈铎塔、毕尔哈特卡尔玛和毕尔哈德巴努。长子毕尔哈铎塔的儿子是毕尔汉玛纳，毕尔汉玛纳生了佳亚铎塔。
231.yw_en: The sons of Pṛthulākṣa were Bṛhadratha, Bṛhatkarmā and Bṛhadbhānu. From the eldest, Bṛhadratha, came a son named Bṛhanmanā, and from Bṛhanmanā came a son named Jayadratha.

231.ldw:
vijayas tasya sambhūtyāṁ
 tato dhṛtir ajāyata
tato dhṛtavratas tasya
 satkarmādhirathas tataḥ|
231.ldw_fc: vijayaḥ ; tasya ; sambhūtyām ; tataḥ ; dhṛtiḥ ; ajāyata ; tataḥ ; dhṛtavrataḥ ; tasya ; satkarmā ; adhirathaḥ ; tataḥ ;
231.words_en_fc: Vijaya; of him (Jayadratha); in the womb of the wife; thereafter (from Vijaya); Dhṛti; took birth; from him (Dhṛti); a son named Dhṛtavrata; of him (Dhṛtavrata); Satkarmā; Adhiratha; from him (Satkarmā).;
231.yw_zh: 佳亚铎塔与他妻子桑布缇生了维佳亚，维佳亚生子兑提。兑提的儿子是兑塔瓦塔，兑塔瓦塔生了萨特卡尔玛，萨特卡尔玛的儿子名叫阿迪茹阿塔。
231.yw_en: The son of Jayadratha, by the womb of his wife Sambhūti, was Vijaya, and from Vijaya, Dhṛti was born. From Dhṛti came Dhṛtavrata; from Dhṛtavrata, Satkarmā; and from Satkarmā, Adhiratha.

231.ldw:
yo ’sau gaṅgā-taṭe krīḍan
 mañjūṣāntargataṁ śiśum
kuntyāpaviddhaṁ kānīnam
 anapatyo ’karot sutam|
231.ldw_fc: yaḥ asau ; gaṅgā-taṭe ; krīḍan ; mañjūṣa-antaḥgatam ; śiśum ; kuntyā apaviddham ; kānīnam ; anapatyaḥ ; akarot ; sutam ;
231.words_en_fc: one who (Adhiratha); on the bank of the Ganges; while playing; packed in a basket; a baby was found; this baby had been abandoned by Kuntī; because the baby was born during her maiden state, before her marriage; this Adhiratha, being sonless; accepted the baby; as his son.;
231.yw_zh: 阿迪茹阿塔在恒河岸边游玩时，发现有个篮子里躺着个被包裹好的婴儿。这个婴儿是琨缇未婚生下并遗弃的孩子。阿迪茹阿塔因为没儿子，所以就将他视为亲生儿子抚养(这儿子后来被称为卡尔纳)。
231.yw_en: While playing on the bank of the Ganges, Adhiratha found a baby wrapped up in a basket. The baby had been left by Kuntī because he was born before she was married. Because Adhiratha had no sons, he raised this baby as his own. [This son was later known as Karṇa.]

231.ldw:
vṛṣasenaḥ sutas tasya
 karṇasya jagatīpate
druhyoś ca tanayo babhruḥ
 setus tasyātmajas tataḥ|
231.ldw_fc: vṛṣasenaḥ ; sutaḥ ; tasya karṇasya ; jagatī pate ; druhyoḥ ca ; tanayaḥ ; babhruḥ ; setuḥ ; tasya ; ātmajaḥ tataḥ ;
231.words_en_fc: Vṛṣasena; a son; of that same Karṇa; O Mahārāja Parīkṣit; of Druhyu, the third son of Yayāti; a son; Babhru; Setu; of him (Babhru); a son thereafter.;
231.yw_zh: 君王啊!卡尔纳唯一的儿子是维沙森纳。雅亚提的第三个儿子杜茹尤，生了个儿子巴布茹，巴布茹的儿子名叫瑟图。
231.yw_en: O King, the only son of Karṇa was Vṛṣasena. Druhyu, the third son of Yayāti, had a son named Babhru, and the son of Babhru was known as Setu.

231.ldw:
ārabdhas tasya gāndhāras
 tasya dharmas tato dhṛtaḥ
dhṛtasya durmadas tasmāt
 pracetāḥ prācetasaḥ śatam|
231.ldw_fc: ārabdhaḥ ; tasya ; gāndhāraḥ ; tasya ; dharmaḥ ; tataḥ ; dhṛtaḥ ; dhṛtasya ; durmadaḥ ; tasmāt ; pracetāḥ ; prācetasaḥ ; śatam ;
231.words_en_fc: Ārabdha (was the son of Setu); of him (Ārabdha); a son named Gāndhāra; of him (Gāndhāra); a son known as Dharma; from him (Dharma); a son named Dhṛta; of Dhṛta; a son named Durmada; from him (Durmada); a son named Pracetā; of Pracetā; there were one hundred sons.;
231.yw_zh: 瑟图的儿子是阿茹阿达，阿茹阿达生子网达茹阿，网达茹阿的儿子名叫达尔玛。达尔玛生子兑塔，兑塔的儿子是杜尔玛达。杜尔玛达有个儿子名叫帕柴塔，帕柴塔生了一百个儿子。
231.yw_en: The son of Setu was Ārabdha, Ārabdha’s son was Gāndhāra, and Gāndhāra’s son was Dharma. Dharma’s son was Dhṛta, Dhṛta’s son was Durmada, and Durmada’s son was Pracetā, who had one hundred sons.

231.ldw:
mlecchādhipatayo ’bhūvann
 udīcīṁ diśam āśritāḥ
turvasoś ca suto vahnir
 vahner bhargo ’tha bhānumān|
231.ldw_fc: mleccha ; adhipatayaḥ ; abhūvan ; udīcīm ; diśam ; āśritāḥ ; turvasoḥ ca ; sutaḥ ; vahniḥ ; vahneḥ ; bhargaḥ ; atha ; bhānumān ;
231.words_en_fc: of the lands known as Mlecchadeśa (where Vedic civilization was not present); the kings; became; on the northern side of India; the direction; accepting as the jurisdiction; of Turvasu, the second son of Mahārāja Yayāti; the son; Vahni; of Vahni; the son named Bharga; thereafter, his son; Bhānumān.;
231.yw_zh: 帕柴塔的儿子们占领没有韦达文明的北部，成为那里的君王。图尔瓦苏是雅亚提的第二个儿子。图尔瓦苏的儿子是瓦尼，瓦尼生子巴尔嘎，巴尔嘎的儿子名叫巴努曼。
231.yw_en: The Pracetās [the sons of Pracetā] occupied the northern side of India, which was devoid of Vedic civilization, and became kings there. Yayāti’s second son was Turvasu. The son of Turvasu was Vahni; the son of Vahni, Bharga; the son of Bharga, Bhānumān.

231.ldw:
tribhānus tat-suto ’syāpi
 karandhama udāra-dhīḥ
marutas tat-suto ’putraḥ
 putraṁ pauravam anvabhūt|
231.ldw_fc: tribhānuḥ ; tat-sutaḥ ; asya ; api ; karandhamaḥ ; udāra-dhīḥ ; marutaḥ ; tat-sutaḥ ; aputraḥ ; putram ; pauravam ; anvabhūt ;
231.words_en_fc: Tribhānu; the son of Bhānumān; of him (Tribhānu); also; Karandhama; who was very magnanimous; Maruta; the son of Karandhama; being without issue; as his son; a son of the Pūru dynasty, Mahārāja Duṣmanta; adopted.;
231.yw_zh: 巴努曼的儿子是特瑞巴努，特瑞巴努生了慷慨大度的卡冉达玛。卡冉达玛的儿子名叫玛茹塔，玛茹塔没儿子，因此收养了普茹王朝的一个儿子(杜施曼塔王)，将他视为己出。
231.yw_en: The son of Bhānumān was Tribhānu, and his son was the magnanimous Karandhama. Karandhama’s son was Maruta, who had no sons and who therefore adopted a son of the Pūru dynasty [Mahārāja Duṣmanta] as his own.

231.ldw:
duṣmantaḥ sa punar bheje
 sva-vaṁśaṁ rājya-kāmukaḥ
yayāter jyeṣṭha-putrasya
 yador vaṁśaṁ nararṣabha|varṇayāmi mahā-puṇyaṁ
 sarva-pāpa-haraṁ nṛṇām
yador vaṁśaṁ naraḥ śrutvā
 sarva-pāpaiḥ pramucyate|
231.ldw_fc: duṣmantaḥ ; saḥ ; punaḥ bheje ; sva-vaṁśam ; rājya-kāmukaḥ ; yayāteḥ ; jyeṣṭha-putrasya ; yadoḥ vaṁśam ; nara-ṛṣabha ; varṇayāmi ; mahā-puṇyam ; sarva-pāpa-haram ; nṛṇām ; yadoḥ vaṁśam ; naraḥ ; śrutvā ; sarva-pāpaiḥ ; pramucyate ;
231.words_en_fc: Mahārāja Duṣmanta; he; again accepted; his original dynasty (the Pūru dynasty); because of desiring the royal throne; of Mahārāja Yayāti; of the first son, Yadu; the dynasty of Yadu; O best of human beings, Mahārāja Parīkṣit; I shall describe; supremely pious; vanquishes the reactions of sinful activities; of human society; the description of the dynasty of Yadu; any person; simply by hearing; from all reactions of sinful activities; is freed.;
231.yw_zh: 杜施曼塔王想要坐上王位，所以尽管已接受玛茹塔为自己的父亲，还是回到他出生其中的王朝(普茹王朝)。 帕瑞克西特王啊!我现在要来描述雅亚提王的长子雅杜的王朝。这种描述无比虔诚，可以克服人类社会罪恶活动的反应。仅仅靠聆听这描述，人就能摆脱一切恶报。
231.yw_en: Mahārāja Duṣmanta, desiring to occupy the throne, returned to his original dynasty [the Pūru dynasty], even though he had accepted Maruta as his father. O Mahārāja Parīkṣit, let me now describe the dynasty of Yadu, the eldest son of Mahārāja Yayāti. This description is supremely pious, and it vanquishes the reactions of sinful activities in human society. Simply by hearing this description, one is freed from all sinful reactions.

231.ldw:
yatrāvatīrṇo bhagavān
 paramātmā narākṛtiḥ
yadoḥ sahasrajit kroṣṭā
 nalo ripur iti śrutāḥ|catvāraḥ sūnavas tatra
 śatajit prathamātmajaḥ
mahāhayo reṇuhayo
 haihayaś ceti tat-sutāḥ|
231.ldw_fc: yatra ; avatīrṇaḥ ; bhagavān ; paramātmā ; nara-ākṛtiḥ ; yadoḥ ; sahasrajit ; kroṣṭā ; nalaḥ ; ripuḥ ; iti śrutāḥ ; catvāraḥ ; sūnavaḥ ; tatra ; śatajit ; prathama-ātmajaḥ ; mahāhayaḥ ; reṇuhayaḥ ; haihayaḥ ; ca ; iti ; tat-sutāḥ ;
231.words_en_fc: wherein, in which dynasty; descended; the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Kṛṣṇa; who is the Supersoul of all living entities; a person, exactly resembling a human being; of Yadu; Sahasrajit; Kroṣṭā; Nala; Ripu; thus they are celebrated; four; sons; therein; Śatajit; of the first sons; Mahāhaya; Reṇuhaya; Haihaya; and; thus; his sons (the sons of Śatajit).;
231.yw_zh: 至尊人格首神奎师那一一众生心中的超灵，以祂原本的人的形象降临雅杜王朝。雅杜有四个儿子，分别名叫萨哈刷吉特、克柔施塔、纳拉和瑞普。在这四个儿子中，长子萨哈刷吉特有个名叫沙塔吉特的儿子，沙塔吉持有三个儿子，分别名叫玛哈亥亚、瑞努亥亚和亥哈亚。
231.yw_en: The Supreme Personality of Godhead, Kṛṣṇa, the Supersoul in the hearts of all living entities, descended in His original form as a human being in the dynasty or family of Yadu. Yadu had four sons, named Sahasrajit, Kroṣṭā, Nala and Ripu. Of these four, the eldest, Sahasrajit, had a son named Śatajit, who had three sons, named Mahāhaya, Reṇuhaya and Haihaya.
231.yz_zh:
《圣典博伽瓦谭》(Srimad-Bhagavatam)第1篇第2章的第11节诗证实说:

“博学的超然主义者了解绝对真理，把这没有相对性的实体称为梵(布茹阿曼)、超灵(帕茹阿玛特玛)或人格首神(巴嘎万)。”大多数超然主义者只了解不具人格特征的梵(Brahman)或处在局部区域的超灵(Paramatma)，因为人格首神很难了解。正如《博伽梵歌》第7草的第3节诗记载，至尊主说:

“在千万人中，也许只有一个人力求达到完美，而在达到完美的人中，很难有一个人真正了解我。”瑜伽师(yogi)和知识思辨者(jnani)，也就是神秘瑜伽师和非人格神主义者，虽然对自我有所了解，超越普通人，能了解绝对真理的非人格方面及在局部区域的展示，但却无法理解至尊绝对真理怎么能是一个人。因此，据说在许多已经认识到绝对真理的灵魂(siddha)中，也许只有一个能了解完全就像一个人的奎师那(narakrti)。奎师那本人在展示了宇宙形象(virat-rupa)后，解释了他的人的形象。那宇宙形象并非至尊主的原本形象;至尊主的原本形象是，有两只手臂并吹笛子的美丽形象(yam syamasundaram acintya-guna-svarupam)。至尊主的形象是对他不可思议特质的证明。尽管至尊主在他的呼吸间维系着数不胜数的宇宙，但他的形象却恰似人的形象。然而，那并不意味着他是人类。这是他的原本形象，可由于他看上去像个人，那些缺乏知识的人就认为他是普通人。至尊主说:

“当我以人的形象降临时，愚蠢的人轻视我。他们不知道我作为万事万物的至尊主所具有的超然性。”(《博伽梵歌》9.11)至尊主凭他的超然本性，既以无所不在的超灵形式生活在众生心中，同时看上去就像一个人类。假象宗(Mayavada)哲学说，至尊主原本是不具人格特征的，但当他降临时，他呈现人的形象和许多其他的形象。然而事实是，他原本的形象是人形，不具人格特征的梵由他身体的光芒构成（yasya prabha prabhavato jagad-anda-koti。)
231.yz_en:
As confirmed in Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam (1.2.11):

vadanti tat tattva-vidas
 tattvaṁ yaj jñānam advayam
brahmeti paramātmeti
 bhagavān iti śabdyate

“Learned transcendentalists who know the Absolute Truth call this nondual substance Brahman, Paramātmā or Bhagavān.” The majority of transcendentalists understand only the impersonal Brahman or localized Paramātmā, for the Personality of Godhead is very difficult to understand. As the Lord says in Bhagavad-gītā (7.3):

manuṣyāṇāṁ sahasreṣu
 kaścid yatati siddhaye
yatatām api siddhānāṁ
 kaścin māṁ vetti tattvataḥ

“Out of many thousands among men, one may endeavor for perfection, and of those who have achieved perfection, hardly one knows Me in truth.” The yogīs and jñānīs — that is, the mystic yogīs and the impersonalists — can understand the Absolute Truth as impersonal or localized, but although such realized souls are above ordinary human beings, they cannot understand how the Supreme Absolute Truth can be a person. Therefore it is said that out of many siddhas, the souls who have already realized the Absolute Truth, one may understand Kṛṣṇa, who exactly resembles a human being (narākṛti). This human form was explained by Kṛṣṇa Himself after He manifested the virāṭ-rūpa. The virāṭ-rūpa is not the original form of the Lord; the Lord’s original form is Dvibhuja-śyāmasundara, Muralīdhara, the Lord with two hands, playing a flute (yaṁ śyāmasundaram acintya-guṇa-svarūpam). The Lord’s forms are proof of His inconceivable qualities. Although the Lord maintains innumerable universes within the period of His breath, He is dressed with a form exactly like that of a human being. That does not mean, however, that He is a human being. This is His original form, but because He looks like a human being, those with a poor fund of knowledge consider Him an ordinary man. The Lord says:

avajānanti māṁ mūḍhā
 mānuṣīṁ tanum āśritam
paraṁ bhāvam ajānanto
 mama bhūta-maheśvaram

“Fools deride Me when I descend in the human form. They do not know My transcendental nature and My supreme dominion over all that be.” (Bg. 9.11) By the Lord’s paraṁ bhāvam, or transcendental nature, He is the all-pervading Paramātmā living in the core of the hearts of all living entities, yet He looks like a human being. Māyāvāda philosophy says that the Lord is originally impersonal but assumes a human form and many other forms when He descends. Actually, however, He is originally like a human being, and the impersonal Brahman consists of the rays of His body (yasya prabhā prabhavato jagad-aṇḍa-koṭi).

231.ldw:
dharmas tu haihaya-suto
 netraḥ kunteḥ pitā tataḥ
sohañjir abhavat kunter
 mahiṣmān bhadrasenakaḥ|
231.ldw_fc: dharmaḥ tu ; haihaya-sutaḥ ; netraḥ ; kunteḥ ; pitā ; tataḥ ; sohañjiḥ ; abhavat ; kunteḥ ; mahiṣmān ; bhadrasenakaḥ ;
231.words_en_fc: Dharma, however; became the son of Haihaya; Netra; of Kunti; the father; from him (Dharma); Sohañji; became; the son of Kunti; Mahiṣmān; Bhadrasenaka.;
231.yw_zh: 亥哈亚的儿子是达尔玛，达尔玛生子内陀，内陀是琨提的父亲。琨提的儿子名叫索汉吉，索汉吉生子玛黑施曼，玛黑施曼的儿子是巴铎森纳。
231.yw_en: The son of Haihaya was Dharma, and the son of Dharma was Netra, the father of Kunti. From Kunti came a son named Sohañji, from Sohañji came Mahiṣmān, and from Mahiṣmān, Bhadrasenaka.

231.ldw:
durmado bhadrasenasya
 dhanakaḥ kṛtavīryasūḥ
kṛtāgniḥ kṛtavarmā ca
 kṛtaujā dhanakātmajāḥ|
231.ldw_fc: durmadaḥ ; bhadrasenasya ; dhanakaḥ ; kṛtavīrya-sūḥ ; kṛtāgniḥ ; kṛtavarmā ; ca ; kṛtaujāḥ ; dhanaka-ātmajāḥ ;
231.words_en_fc: Durmada; of Bhadrasena; Dhanaka; giving birth to Kṛtavīrya; by the name Kṛtāgni; Kṛtavarmā; also; Kṛtaujā; sons of Dhanaka.;
231.yw_zh: 巴铎森纳生了杜尔玛达和达纳卡。达纳卡是奎塔维尔亚、奎塔格尼、奎塔瓦尔玛和奎涛佳的父亲。
231.yw_en: The sons of Bhadrasena were known as Durmada and Dhanaka. Dhanaka was the father of Kṛtavīrya and also of Kṛtāgni, Kṛtavarmā and Kṛtaujā.

231.ldw:
arjunaḥ kṛtavīryasya
 sapta-dvīpeśvaro ’bhavat
dattātreyād dharer aṁśāt
 prāpta-yoga-mahāguṇaḥ|
231.ldw_fc: arjunaḥ ; kṛtavīryasya ; sapta-dvīpa ; īśvaraḥ abhavat ; dattātreyāt ; hareḥ aṁśāt ; prāpta ; yoga-mahāguṇaḥ ;
231.words_en_fc: Arjuna; of Kṛtavīrya; of the seven islands (the whole world); became the emperor; from Dattātreya; from he who was the incarnation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; obtained; the quality of mystic power.;
231.yw_zh: 奎塔维尔亚的儿子名叫阿尔诸纳。他(卡尔塔维尔亚尔诸纳)成为由七个岛构成的整个世界的帝王，主从至尊人格首神的化身达塔垂亚那里得到神秘力量。这使他具有了八种瑜伽神通。
231.yw_en: The son of Kṛtavīrya was Arjuna. He [Kārtavīryārjuna] became the emperor of the entire world, consisting of seven islands, and received mystic power from Dattātreya, the incarnation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead. Thus he obtained the mystic perfections known as aṣṭa-siddhi.

231.ldw:
na nūnaṁ kārtavīryasya
 gatiṁ yāsyanti pārthivāḥ
yajña-dāna-tapo-yogaiḥ
 śruta-vīrya-dayādibhiḥ|
231.ldw_fc: na ; nūnam ; kārtavīryasya ; gatim ; yāsyanti ; pārthivāḥ ; yajña ; dāna ; tapaḥ ; yogaiḥ ; śruta ; vīrya ; dayā ; ādibhiḥ ;
231.words_en_fc: not; indeed; of Emperor Kārtavīrya; the activities; could understand or achieve; everyone on the earth; sacrifices; charity; austerities; mystic powers; education; strength; mercy; by all these qualities.;
231.yw_zh: 在这世上，就祭祀、布施、苦修、神秘力量、教育、力量或仁慈而言，没人能与卡尔塔维尔亚尔诸纳相比。
231.yw_en: No other king in this world could equal Kārtavīryārjuna in sacrifices, charity, austerity, mystic power, education, strength or mercy.

231.ldw:
pañcāśīti sahasrāṇi
 hy avyāhata-balaḥ samāḥ
anaṣṭa-vitta-smaraṇo
 bubhuje ’kṣayya-ṣaḍ-vasu|
231.ldw_fc: pañcāśīti ; sahasrāṇi ; hi ; avyāhata ; balaḥ ; samāḥ ; anaṣṭa ; vitta ; smaraṇaḥ ; bubhuje ; akṣayya ; ṣaṭ-vasu ;
231.words_en_fc: eighty-five; thousands; indeed; inexhaustible; the strength of whom; years; without deterioration; material opulences; and memory; enjoyed; without deterioration; six kinds of enjoyable material opulence.;
231.yw_zh: 卡尔塔维尔亚尔诸纳用他始终充沛的精力和毫不减损的记忆力，持续享受物质财富达八万五千年之久。换句话说，他用他的六个感官享受无穷无尽的物质财富。
231.yw_en: For eighty-five thousand years, Kārtavīryārjuna continuously enjoyed material opulences with full bodily strength and unimpaired memory. In other words, he enjoyed inexhaustible material opulences with his six senses.

231.ldw:
tasya putra-sahasreṣu
 pañcaivorvaritā mṛdhe
jayadhvajaḥ śūraseno
 vṛṣabho madhur ūrjitaḥ|
231.ldw_fc: tasya ; putra-sahasreṣu ; pañca ; eva ; urvaritāḥ ; mṛdhe ; jayadhvajaḥ ; śūrasenaḥ ; vṛṣabhaḥ ; madhuḥ ; ūrjitaḥ ;
231.words_en_fc: of him (Kārtavīryārjuna); among the one thousand sons; five; only; remained alive; in a fight (with Paraśurāma); Jayadhvaja; Śūrasena; Vṛṣabha; Madhu; and Ūrjita.;
231.yw_zh: 在与帕茹阿舒茹阿玛作战后，卡尔塔维尔亚尔诸纳的一千个儿子，只有五个活了下来。他们分别是:佳亚杜瓦佳、舒茹阿森纳、维沙巴、玛杜和乌尔吉特。
231.yw_en: Of the one thousand sons of Kārtavīryārjuna, only five remained alive after the fight with Paraśurāma. Their names were Jayadhvaja, Śūrasena, Vṛṣabha, Madhu and Ūrjita.

231.ldw:
jayadhvajāt tālajaṅghas
 tasya putra-śataṁ tv abhūt
kṣatraṁ yat tālajaṅghākhyam
 aurva-tejopasaṁhṛtam|
231.ldw_fc: jayadhvajāt ; tālajaṅghaḥ ; tasya ; putra-śatam ; tu ; abhūt ; kṣatram ; yat ; tālajaṅgha-ākhyam ; aurva-tejaḥ ; upasaṁhṛtam ;
231.words_en_fc: of Jayadhvaja; a son named Tālajaṅgha; of him (Tālajaṅgha); one hundred sons; indeed; were born; a dynasty of kṣatriyas; which; were known as the Tālajaṅghas; being very powerful; were killed by Mahārāja Sagara.;
231.yw_zh: 佳亚杜瓦佳名叫塔拉坚嘎的儿子生了一百个儿子。那个王朝的全体查锤亚被统称为塔拉坚嘎;他们都被萨嘎茹阿王从奥尔良圣人那儿得到的强大力量所消灭。
231.yw_en: Jayadhvaja had a son named Tālajaṅgha, who had one hundred sons. All the kṣatriyas in that dynasty, known as Tālajaṅgha, were annihilated by the great power received by Mahārāja Sagara from Aurva Ṛṣi.

231.ldw:
teṣāṁ jyeṣṭho vītihotro
 vṛṣṇiḥ putro madhoḥ smṛtaḥ
tasya putra-śataṁ tv āsīd
 vṛṣṇi-jyeṣṭhaṁ yataḥ kulam|
231.ldw_fc: teṣām ; jyeṣṭhaḥ ; vītihotraḥ ; vṛṣṇiḥ ; putraḥ ; madhoḥ ; smṛtaḥ ; tasya ; putra-śatam ; tu ; āsīt ; vṛṣṇi ; jyeṣṭham ; yataḥ ; kulam ;
231.words_en_fc: of all of them; the eldest son; a son named Vītihotra; Vṛṣṇi; the son; of Madhu; was well known; of him (Vṛṣṇi); one hundred sons; indeed; there were; Vṛṣṇi; the eldest; from him; the dynasty.;
231.yw_zh: 在塔拉坚嘎的儿子中，维提厚陀是长子。维提厚陀的儿子玛杜，有一个著名的儿子名叫维施尼。玛杜有一百个儿子，其中维施尼是长子。名叫雅德瓦、玛德瓦和维施尼的王朝，就来源于雅杜、玛杜和维施尼。
231.yw_en: Of the sons of Tālajaṅgha, Vītihotra was the eldest. The son of Vītihotra named Madhu had a celebrated son named Vṛṣṇi. Madhu had one hundred sons, of whom Vṛṣṇi was the eldest. The dynasties known as Yādava, Mādhava and Vṛṣṇi had their origin from Yadu, Madhu and Vṛṣṇi.

231.ldw:
mādhavā vṛṣṇayo rājan
 yādavāś ceti saṁjñitāḥ
yadu-putrasya ca kroṣṭoḥ
 putro vṛjinavāṁs tataḥ|svāhito ’to viṣadgur vai
 tasya citrarathas tataḥ
śaśabindur mahā-yogī
 mahā-bhāgo mahān abhūt
caturdaśa-mahāratnaś
 cakravarty aparājitaḥ|
231.ldw_fc: mādhavāḥ ; vṛṣṇayaḥ ; rājan ; yādavāḥ ; ca ; iti ; saṁjñitāḥ ; yadu-putrasya ; ca ; kroṣṭoḥ ; putraḥ ; vṛjinavān ; tataḥ ; svāhitaḥ ; ataḥ ; viṣadguḥ ; vai ; tasya ; citrarathaḥ ; tataḥ ; śaśabinduḥ ; mahā-yogī ; mahā-bhāgaḥ ; mahān ; abhūt ; caturdaśa-mahāratnaḥ ; cakravartī ; aparājitaḥ ;
231.words_en_fc: the dynasty beginning from Madhu; the dynasty beginning from Vṛṣṇi; O King (Mahārāja Parīkṣit); the dynasty beginning from Yadu; and; thus; are so-called because of those different persons; of the son of Yadu; also; of Kroṣṭā; the son; his name was Vṛjinavān; from him (Vṛjinavān); Svāhita; thereafter; a son named Viṣadgu; indeed; of him; Citraratha; from him; Śaśabindu; a great mystic; most fortunate; a great personality; he became; fourteen kinds of great opulences; he possessed as the emperor; not defeated by anyone else.;
231.yw_zh: 帕瑞克西特王啊!由于雅杜、玛杜和维施尼各自开创了一个王朝，他们的王朝被称为雅德瓦、玛德瓦和维施尼王朝。雅杜名叫克柔施塔的儿子生了名叫维吉纳万的儿子。维吉纳万的儿子是斯瓦黑塔，斯瓦黑塔生子维沙德古。 维沙德古的儿子名叫祺陀茹阿塔，祺陀茹阿塔的儿子是沙纱宾杜。作为一名伟大的神秘主义者，沙纱宾杜极其幸运地拥有十四种财富，是十四种非凡珍宝的拥有者。他因此而成为世界帝王。
231.yw_en: O Mahārāja Parīkṣit, because Yadu, Madhu and Vṛṣṇi each inaugurated a dynasty, their dynasties are known as Yādava, Mādhava and Vṛṣṇi. The son of Yadu named Kroṣṭā had a son named Vṛjinavān. The son of Vṛjinavān was Svāhita; the son of Svāhita, Viṣadgu; the son of Viṣadgu, Citraratha; and the son of Citraratha, Śaśabindu. The greatly fortunate Śaśabindu, who was a great mystic, possessed fourteen opulences and was the owner of fourteen great jewels. Thus he became the emperor of the world.
231.yz_zh: 《玛尔康戴亚往世书》(Markandeya Purana)中描述十四种非凡的珍宝是: (1)大象，(2)马匹，(3)战车，(4)妻子，(5)箭，(6)财宝库，(7)花环， (8)华贵的服装，(9)树木，(10)长矛，(11)套索，(12)珠宝，(13)华盖，(14)规范原则。要当帝王，人必须拥有所有这十四种财富。沙纱宾杜拥有全部这些财富。
231.yz_en: In the Mārkaṇḍeya Purāṇa the fourteen kinds of great jewels are described as follows: (1) an elephant, (2) a horse, (3) a chariot, (4) a wife, (5) arrows, (6) a reservoir of wealth, (7) a garland, (8) valuable costumes, (9) trees, (10) a spear, (11) a noose, (12) jewels, (13) an umbrella, and (14) regulative principles. To be the emperor, one must possess all fourteen of these opulences. Śaśabindu possessed them all.

231.ldw:
tasya patnī-sahasrāṇāṁ
 daśānāṁ sumahā-yaśāḥ
daśa-lakṣa-sahasrāṇi
 putrāṇāṁ tāsv ajījanat|
231.ldw_fc: tasya ; patnī ; sahasrāṇām ; daśānām ; su-mahā-yaśāḥ ; daśa ; lakṣa ; sahasrāṇi ; putrāṇām ; tāsu ; ajījanat ;
231.words_en_fc: of Śaśabindu; wives; of thousands; ten; greatly famous; ten; lakhs (one lakh equals one hundred thousand); thousands; of sons; in them; he begot.;
231.yw_zh: 沙纱宾杜有一万个妻子，每个妻子都替他生了十万个儿子。因此，他一共有十亿个儿子。
231.yw_en: The famous Śaśabindu had ten thousand wives, and by each he begot a lakh of sons. Therefore the number of his sons was ten thousand lakhs.

231.ldw:
teṣāṁ tu ṣaṭ pradhānānāṁ
 pṛthuśravasa ātmajaḥ
dharmo nāmośanā tasya
 hayamedha-śatasya yāṭ|
231.ldw_fc: teṣām ; tu ; ṣaṭ pradhānānām ; pṛthuśravasaḥ ; ātmajaḥ ; dharmaḥ ; nāma ; uśanā ; tasya ; hayamedha-śatasya ; yāṭ ;
231.words_en_fc: out of so many sons; but; of whom there were six foremost sons; of Pṛthuśravā; the son; Dharma; by the name; Uśanā; his; of one hundred aśvamedha sacrifices; he was the performer.;
231.yw_zh: 在这众多的儿子中，有普瑞图刷瓦和普瑞图克依尔提等六个儿子最著名。普瑞图刷瓦的儿子名叫达尔玛，达尔玛生子乌珊纳。乌珊纳举行了一百场马祭。
231.yw_en: Among these many sons, six were the foremost, such as Pṛthuśravā and Pṛthukīrti. The son of Pṛthuśravā was known as Dharma, and his son was known as Uśanā. Uśanā was the performer of one hundred horse sacrifices.

231.ldw:
tat-suto rucakas tasya
 pañcāsann ātmajāḥ śṛṇu
purujid-rukma-rukmeṣu-
 pṛthu-jyāmagha-saṁjñitāḥ|
231.ldw_fc: tat-sutaḥ ; rucakaḥ ; tasya ; pañca ; āsan ; ātmajāḥ ; śṛṇu ; purujit ; rukma ; rukmeṣu ; pṛthu ; jyāmagha ; saṁjñitāḥ ;
231.words_en_fc: the son of Uśanā; Rucaka; of him; five; there were; sons; please hear (their names); Purujit; Rukma; Rukmeṣu; Pṛthu; Jyāmagha; these five sons were named.;
231.yw_zh: 乌珊纳的儿子是茹查卡，茹查卡有五个儿子，分别名叫普茹吉特、茹克玛、茹克梅舒、普瑞图和佳玛嘎。请听我介绍这些儿子。
231.yw_en: The son of Uśanā was Rucaka, who had five sons — Purujit, Rukma, Rukmeṣu, Pṛthu and Jyāmagha. Please hear of these sons from me.

231.ldw:
jyāmaghas tv aprajo ’py anyāṁ
 bhāryāṁ śaibyā-patir bhayāt
nāvindac chatru-bhavanād
 bhojyāṁ kanyām ahāraṣīt|ratha-sthāṁ tāṁ nirīkṣyāha
 śaibyā patim amarṣitā
keyaṁ kuhaka mat-sthānaṁ
 ratham āropiteti vai
snuṣā tavety abhihite
 smayantī patim abravīt|
231.ldw_fc: jyāmaghaḥ ; tu ; aprajaḥ api ; anyām ; bhāryām ; śaibyā-patiḥ ; bhayāt ; na avindat ; śatru-bhavanāt ; bhojyām ; kanyām ; ahāraṣīt ; ratha-sthām ; tām ; nirīkṣya ; āha ; śaibyā ; patim ; amarṣitā ; kā iyam ; kuhaka ; mat-sthānam ; ratham ; āropitā ; iti ; vai ; snuṣā ; tava ; iti ; abhihite ; smayantī ; patim ; abravīt ;
231.words_en_fc: King Jyāmagha; indeed; although issueless; another; wife; because he was the husband of Śaibyā; out of fear; did not accept; from the enemy’s camp; a prostitute used for sense gratification; girl; brought; who was seated on the chariot; her; seeing; said; Śaibyā, the wife of Jyāmagha; unto her husband; being very angry; who is this; you cheater; my place; on the chariot; has been allowed to sit; thus; indeed; daughter-in-law; your; thus; being informed; smilingly; unto her husband; said.;
231.yw_zh: 佳玛嘎没有儿子，但因为怕他妻子晒碧雅，所以没再娶妻。佳玛嘎有一次从敌对王朝中带回一个供享乐用的少女，晒碧雅看到后十分气愤，对她丈夫说:”我的丈夫， 你这骗子，这个坐在战车上我的座位上的少女是谁?”佳玛嘎回答道:”这少女将是你的儿媳妇。”听了这句玩笑，晒碧雅微笑作答。
231.yw_en: Jyāmagha had no sons, but because he was fearful of his wife, Śaibyā, he could not accept another wife. Jyāmagha once took from the house of some royal enemy a girl who was a prostitute, but upon seeing her Śaibyā was very angry and said to her husband, “My husband, you cheater, who is this girl sitting upon my seat on the chariot?” Jyāmagha then replied, “This girl will be your daughter-in-law.” Upon hearing these joking words, Śaibyā smilingly replied.

231.ldw:
ahaṁ bandhyāsapatnī ca
 snuṣā me yujyate katham
janayiṣyasi yaṁ rājñi
 tasyeyam upayujyate|
231.ldw_fc: aham ; bandhyā ; asa-patnī ; ca ; snuṣā ; me ; yujyate ; katham ; janayiṣyasi ; yam ; rājñi ; tasya ; iyam ; upayujyate ;
231.words_en_fc: I am; sterile; I have no co-wife; also; daughter-in-law; my; could be; how; you will give birth to; which son; O my dear Queen; for him; this girl; will be very suitable.;
231.yw_zh: 晒碧雅说:”我不生育，你也没有其他妻子。这姑娘怎么能是我的儿媳妇呢?请告诉找。”佳玛嘎回答道: “我亲爱的王后，我要看到你确实有个儿子，而这少女将是你的儿媳妇。”
231.yw_en: Śaibyā said, “I am sterile and have no co-wife. How can this girl be my daughter-in-law? Please tell me.” Jyāmagha replied, “My dear Queen, I shall see that you indeed have a son and that this girl will be your daughter-in-law.”

231.ldw:
anvamodanta tad viśve-
 devāḥ pitara eva ca
śaibyā garbham adhāt kāle
 kumāraṁ suṣuve śubham
sa vidarbha iti prokta
 upayeme snuṣāṁ satīm|
231.ldw_fc: anvamodanta ; tat ; viśvedevāḥ ; pitaraḥ ; eva ; ca ; śaibyā ; garbham ; adhāt ; kāle ; kumāram ; suṣuve ; śubham ; saḥ ; vidarbhaḥ ; iti ; proktaḥ ; upayeme ; snuṣām ; satīm ;
231.words_en_fc: accepted; that statement predicting the birth of a son; the Viśvedeva demigods; the Pitās or forefathers; indeed; also; the wife of Jyāmagha; pregnancy; conceived; in due course of time; a son; gave birth to; very auspicious; that son; Vidarbha; thus; was well known; later married; who was accepted as daughter-in-law; very chaste girl.;
231.yw_zh: 很久以前，佳玛嘎靠崇拜半神人和祖先取悦了他们。现在，凭借他们的仁慈，佳玛嘎的话语成真。晒碧雅虽然不能生育，但却靠半神人的仁慈怀孕了，并在一段时间后生了名叫维达尔巴的儿子。在那孩子出生前，被带回的少女已经被接受为是儿媳妇，所以维达尔巴在长大成人时真娶了她。
231.yw_en: Long, long ago, Jyāmagha had satisfied the demigods and Pitās by worshiping them. Now, by their mercy, Jyāmagha’s words came true. Although Śaibyā was barren, by the grace of the demigods she became pregnant and in due course of time gave birth to a child named Vidarbha. Before the child’s birth, the girl had been accepted as a daughter-in-law, and therefore Vidarbha actually married her when he grew up.
231.yz_en: Thus end the Bhaktivedanta purports of the Ninth Canto, Twenty-third Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “The Dynasties of the Sons of Yayāti.”

232.ldw:
śrī-śuka uvāca|tasyāṁ vidarbho ’janayat
 putrau nāmnā kuśa-krathau
tṛtīyaṁ romapādaṁ ca
 vidarbha-kula-nandanam|
232.ldw_fc: śrī-śukaḥ uvāca ; tasyām ; vidarbhaḥ ; ajanayat ; putrau ; nāmnā ; kuśa-krathau ; tṛtīyam ; romapādam ca ; vidarbha-kula-nandanam ;
232.words_en_fc: Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said; in that girl; the son born of Śaibyā named Vidarbha; gave birth; to two sons; by the name; Kuśa and Kratha; and a third son; Romapāda also; the favorite in the dynasty of Vidarbha.;
232.yw_zh: 舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米说:维达尔巴与他父亲带回家的少女生了库沙、夸塔和柔玛帕达三个儿子。桑玛帕达是维达尔巴王朝中的宠儿。
232.yw_en: Śukadeva Gosvāmī said: By the womb of the girl brought by his father, Vidarbha begot three sons, named Kuśa, Kratha and Romapāda. Romapāda was the favorite in the dynasty of Vidarbha.

232.ldw:
romapāda-suto babhrur
 babhroḥ kṛtir ajāyata
uśikas tat-sutas tasmāc
 cediś caidyādayo nṛpāḥ|
232.ldw_fc: romapāda-sutaḥ ; babhruḥ ; babhroḥ ; kṛtiḥ ; ajāyata ; uśikaḥ ; tat-sutaḥ ; tasmāt ; cediḥ ; caidya ; ādayaḥ ; nṛpāḥ ;
